query_text: CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY   ,@now                  DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @i                       INT = 1          ,@error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT'          ,@bizdate                DATE          ,@system_id           TINYINT          ,@ticket_id            BIGINT          ,@pool_id              BIGINT          ,@line_id            SMALLINT          ,@combination_id     SMALLINT          ,@activity_id          BIGINT;    SELECT @bizdate = bizdate          ,@system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id    FROM   @data;    --    IF @@rowcount = 0    BEGIN        RETURN;    END;    -- for handling incoming divcal async case if any    IF NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND update_activity_id >= @activity_id    )    BEGIN        -- skip checking bizdate        DELETE dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_divcal_plc               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,pool_id               ,line_id               ,combination_id               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        SELECT @bizdate              ,@system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,pool_id              ,line_id              ,combination_id              ,@activity_id              ,@now              ,@activity_id              ,@now        FROM   @data;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_scheduler_log_task_get(--Input Parameters@bizdate             DATE -- output   ,@return_msg NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count            INT = 0  ,@return_code           INT = 0  ,@now             DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@now_with_offset DATETIME2 = dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset();-- Get Pool DescriptionBEGIN TRYBEGIN TRANSACTION;IF @bizdate IS NULLBEGINSET @bizdate = dbo.udf_get_bizdate();END;DECLARE    @schedule_task TABLE(task_id    BIGINT);UPDATE aSET    a.task_status = 1,a.no_of_execution = ISNULL(a.no_of_execution,0)+1,a.update_at = @nowOUTPUT inserted.task_id   INTO @schedule_taskFROM   dbo.log_task aWHERE  a.bizdate <= @bizdate AND a.task_status = 0 AND a.task_type = 2-- 1:report, 2:adhocAND (a.schedule_at IS NULL OR a.schedule_at < @now_with_offset);-- tasksSELECT b.task_id  ,b.bizdate  ,b.task_type  ,b.task_status  ,b.schedule_at  ,b.checkpoint_id  ,b.no_of_execution  ,c.task_handlerFROM   @schedule_task a   INNER JOIN dbo.log_task b ON b.task_id = a.task_id   INNER JOIN dbo.log_adhoc_task c ON c.task_id = a.task_idORDER BY b.task_id;-- task default parametersSELECT a.task_id  ,b.parameter_name  ,b.parameter_type  ,b.parameter_valueFROM   @schedule_task a   INNER JOIN dbo.log_adhoc_task_parameter b ON a.task_id = b.task_idORDER BY b.task_id,b.parameter_name;COMMIT TRANSACTION;END TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER();SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;-- Reset NOCOUNT to OFFSET NOCOUNT OFF;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT';    MERGE INTO dbo.ticket_divcal /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/ AS t    USING @data AS s    ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.ticket_id = s.ticket_id        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN UPDATE SET           --skip updating bizdate field coz it will be used in partition                          t.child_ticket_id = s.child_ticket_id,                          t.divcal_amount = s.divcal_amount,                          t.selective_refund_amount = s.selective_refund_amount,                          t.is_divcal_done = s.is_divcal_done,                          t.update_activity_id = s.activity_id,                          t.update_at = @now        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('DELETE') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN DELETE        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET AND @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPSERT')          THEN          INSERT(bizdate                ,system_id                ,ticket_id                ,child_ticket_id                ,divcal_amount                ,selective_refund_amount                ,is_divcal_done                ,create_activity_id                ,create_at                ,update_activity_id                ,update_at)          VALUES                 (s.bizdate                 ,s.system_id                 ,s.ticket_id                 ,s.child_ticket_id                 ,s.divcal_amount                 ,s.selective_refund_amount                 ,s.is_divcal_done                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now);END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_divcal(    @activity        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@divcal         dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@divcal_plc dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg             NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0          ,@is_cancel             BIT = 1          ,@is_reverse            BIT = 0;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- set default value, expecially ticket_id, coz it maybe pointing to child ticket_id after partial pay        DECLARE                @system_id                TINYINT              ,@ticket_id                 BIGINT -- TODO: for checking parent ticket id              ,@divcal_new dbo.udt_ticket_divcal;        SELECT @system_id = system_id              ,@ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   @divcal;        SELECT @ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   dbo.ticket_payout        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND next_ticket_id = @ticket_id;        --        -- set parent @ticket_id        INSERT INTO @divcal_new               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,child_ticket_id               ,divcal_amount               ,selective_refund_amount               ,is_divcal_done               ,activity_id)        SELECT bizdate              ,system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,ticket_id              ,divcal_amount              ,selective_refund_amount              ,is_divcal_done              ,activity_id        FROM   @divcal;        --        -- divcal        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal              @divcal_new,             @system_datetime;        --        -- divcal plc for selective refund        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc              @divcal_plc,             @system_datetime;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

insert bulk dbo.previous_day_activities([arc_src_system_id] tinyint,[activity_id] bigint,[activity_bizdate] int,[activity_time] datetime2(7),[activity_code] int,[terminal_id] varchar(10) collate Latin1_General_BIN2,[terminal_msn] int,[centre_no] int,[window_no] smallint,[account_no] varchar(16) collate Latin1_General_BIN2,[account_trxn_no] smallint,[source_system_id] tinyint,[source_activity_id] bigint,[dest_system_id] tinyint,[terminal_session_id] bigint,[customer_session_id] bigint,[bet_category] tinyint,[ticket_type] int,[ticket_id] bigint,[child_ticket_id] bigint,[is_prelog] tinyint,[is_timeout] tinyint,[is_rcv] tinyint,[pocket_type] tinyint,[result_code] int,[result_text] varchar(1000) collate Latin1_General_BIN2,[result_binary] varbinary(8000),[error_text] varchar(500) collate Latin1_General_BIN2,[data_grouping_bizdate] int)

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1522(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabiDECLARE @payout_expired_bizdate intSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDIF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tempdb.sys.tables WHERE name='##tmp_fo_edabi_rpt')BEGINSELECT b.div_cal_done_bizdate, a.payout_expire_bizdateINTO ##tmp_fo_edabi_rptFROM settled_fo_tickets a JOIN settled_fo_ticket_dividends b ON a.ticket_id=b.ticket_idGROUP BY b.div_cal_done_bizdate, a.payout_expire_bizdateENDset @payout_expired_bizdate = @bizdate--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_systemSELECT @bizdateAS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS LiabilityCentreNo,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory,COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketUnpaid,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnpaidLiabilityAmount,COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfHOTicketUnpaid,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnpaidHOLiabilityAmount,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 AND ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets, --no FO ticket forfeited SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 AND ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN (div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedAmount,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 AND ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedHOTickets,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 AND ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN (div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedHOAmount--COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets,--SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate THEN ticket.div_cal_amt ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedAmount,--COUNT(CASE WHEN ( ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate AND ticket.is_head_office = 1) THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets,--SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate AND ticket.is_head_office = 1) THEN ticket.div_cal_amt ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedAmountFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_noISNULL(fts.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--tfe.channel_id,ISNULL(edabi_vw.channel_id,5) AS channel_id, -- hard code 5 if case that activities purgedfmp.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_head_office,ISNULL(t3.last_payout_date_win, ft.payout_expire_bizdate) as payout_expire_bizdate,ftd.is_settled,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON fts.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id--INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id                --INNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pool_status fmps ON fmps.pool_id = fmp.pool_id    INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON fmp.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idLEFT JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idLEFT JOIN (select --pool_id,t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_winfrom (select  t1.div_cal_done_bizdate,t1.payout_expire_bizdate,eetp.last_payout_date_win,row_number() over(partition by div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_idfrom ##tmp_fo_edabi_rpt t1join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date ) t2 where t2.row_id = 1 and CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate  ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @bizdate) t3 on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdateWHERE ft.ticket_status = 2 -- sell, paid, partial_paidAND ftd.div_cal_amt - ft.previous_payout_amt >0--winning and refund tickets --AND fmps.pool_status IN (41, 60)--41PayoutStarted, 60 ConcludedAND fme.event_type_id = 1--AND fmp.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC', 'JKC', 'TNC')--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory  OPTION(MAXDOP 1) END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_eod_housekeep_fo_miscASDECLARE @retryint ,@last_bizdateint,@last_10_bizdateint,@last_63_bizdateint,@last_367_bizdateint,@last_1097_bizdateintDECLARE @tmp_fo_activitiestvpnc_activity_id,@batch_fo_activitiestvpnc_activity_id,@tmp_fo_counter_offerstvpnc_offer_id,@batch_fo_counter_offerstvpnc_offer_id,@tmp_fo_sell_requeststvpnc_request_id,@batch_fo_sell_requeststvpnc_request_id,@tmp_expired_pool_listtvpnc_fo_msg_preview_pool_status,@batch_expired_pool_listtvpnc_fo_msg_preview_pool_status,@tmp_expired_event_listtvpnc_fo_msg_events,@batch_expired_event_listtvpnc_fo_msg_eventsDECLARE @stored_proc_namevarchar(100),@table_namevarchar(100),@action_textvarchar(200),@start_timedatetime2,@end_timedatetime2,@batch_sizeint,@num_recordsint,@total_row_countint,@inserted_recordsint,@deleted_recordsint,@error_codeint,@error_msgvarchar(500),@bizdateintSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @bizdate = MAX(bizdate)FROM business_day WITH (SNAPSHOT)WHERE housekeep_time IS NOT NULL-- SET default return_code = 0SELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL, @retry = 3, @stored_proc_name = OBJECT_NAME(@@procid),@last_bizdate = dbo.udf_datetime2bizdate(CONVERT(DATETIME,CAST(@bizdate AS CHAR(8)),112) - 1),@last_10_bizdate = dbo.udf_datetime2bizdate(CONVERT(DATETIME,CAST(@bizdate AS CHAR(8)),112) - 10),@last_63_bizdate = dbo.udf_datetime2bizdate(CONVERT(DATETIME,CAST(@bizdate AS CHAR(8)),112) - 63),@last_367_bizdate = dbo.udf_datetime2bizdate(CONVERT(DATETIME,CAST(@bizdate AS CHAR(8)),112) - 367),@last_1097_bizdate = dbo.udf_datetime2bizdate(CONVERT(DATETIME,CAST(@bizdate AS CHAR(8)),112) - 1097)-- 3 years -- If this rpt being executed before, will not execute this store procedure anymore withnin this business day-- **********************************************************IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 from dbo.fo_housekeep_history WHERE bizdate = @bizdate AND stored_proc_name = @stored_proc_name)BEGIN RETURN @error_codeEND-- ********************************************************** -- If all rpt is generate and send with indicate 1, then start to run housekeep in housekeep SP-- Because when SOD, we suspect the housekeep make the rpt slow-- **********************************************************--sbc503IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM dbo.fo_div_cal_status WHERE bizdate = @last_bizdate AND is_sbc503_sent  = 1)BEGINRETURN @error_codeEND--FMR_REPORTIF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM dbo.fo_report_history where bizdate = @last_bizdate and report_type = 1)BEGINRETURN @error_codeEND--EDABI_REPORTIF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM dbo.fo_report_history where bizdate = @last_bizdate and report_type = 2)BEGINRETURN @error_codeENDSELECT @batch_size = 3000     -- each time will delete N records, larger size for Dayend, smaller size for online -- ********************************************************************************************-- Build the tmp table to decide which log / FO activity ID to be moved (fo_activities)-- ********************************************************************************************SELECT @table_name = '@tmp_fo_activities', @action_text = 'Build table with record count (fo_activities)', @start_time = SYSDATETIME()-- First to find these log that should be moved before current dayDELETE FROM @tmp_fo_activities   -- clear it first-- Extract expired fo activities information into @tmp_fo_activitiesINSERT INTO @tmp_fo_activities( activity_id )SELECT fo_activity_idFROM dbo.fo_activities WITH (SNAPSHOT)WHERE activity_bizdate <= @last_bizdateOPTION (MAXDOP 5)SELECT @end_time = SYSDATETIME(), @total_row_count = @@ROWCOUNTINSERT INTO dbo.eod_log( bizdate, stored_proc_name, table_name, action_text, start_time, end_time, num_records, update_bizdate, update_time )VALUES( @bizdate, @stored_proc_name, @table_name, @action_text, @start_time, @end_time, @total_row_count, @bizdate, @end_time )SELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL, @retry = 3, @num_records = 1 -- Initialize the num_records = 1 in order to enter the purge logicWHILE (@retry > 0)BEGINBEGIN TRYDELETE FROM @batch_fo_activities   -- clear it first-- Extract some records from @tmp_fo_activities into @batch_fo_activitiesINSERT INTO @batch_fo_activities ( activity_id )SELECT TOP (@batch_size) activity_idFROM @tmp_fo_activitiesOPTION (MAXDOP 5)SELECT @num_records = @@ROWCOUNTIF @num_records > 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION-- move fo_activities_adminSELECT @table_name = 'fo_activities_admin', @action_text = 'HOT TO WARM', @start_time = SYSDATETIME()INSERT INTO dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_admin(fo_activity_id,is_fixed_odds,sports_id,ticket_id,is_claim,release_to_centre_no,create_fo_activity_id,create_bizdate,create_time,update_fo_activity_id,update_bizdate,update_time,row_version)SELECT faa.fo_activity_id, faa.is_fixed_odds, faa.sports_id, faa.ticket_id, faa.is_claim, faa.release_to_centre_no,faa.create_fo_activity_id, faa.create_bizdate, faa.create_time, faa.update_fo_activity_id, faa.update_bizdate, faa.update_time, faa.row_versionFROM @batch_fo_activities batchINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_admin faa WITH (SNAPSHOT)ON batch.activity_id = faa.fo_activity_idOPTION (MAXDOP 5)SELECT @inserted_records = @@ROWCOUNTDELETE faaFROM @batch_fo_activities batchINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_admin faa WITH (SNAPSHOT)ON batch.activity_id = faa.fo_activity_idOPTION (MAXDOP 5)SELECT @deleted_records = @@ROWCOUNT-- Raise error and retry if INSERTED and DELETED count not matchIF @inserted_records <> @deleted_recordsBEGINRAISERROR (50016, 16, 1, @stored_proc_name, @table_name)ENDSELECT @end_time = SYSDATETIME()INSERT INTO dbo.eod_log( bizdate, stored_proc_name, table_name, action_text, start_time, end_time, num_records, update_bizdate, update_time )VALUES( @bizdate, @stored_proc_name, @table_name, @action_text, @start_time, @end_time, @inserted_records, @bizdate, @end_time )-- move fo_activities_cancelSELECT @table_name = 'fo_activities_cancel', is_fixed_odds, is_CancelEarlierCall, ticket_status, prev_ticket_status, create_fo_activity_id, create_bizdate, create_time, update_fo_activity_id, update_bizdate, update_time, row_version)SELECT fac.fo_activity_id, fac.cancel_method, fac.is_previous_day, fac.orig_fo_activity_id, fac.collation_id, fac.ticket_id, is_fixed_odds, is_CancelEarlierCall, ticket_status, fac.prev_ticket_status, fac.create_fo_activity_id, fac.create_bizdate, fac.create_time, fac.update_fo_activity_id, fac.update_bizdate, fac.update_time, fac.row_versionFROM @batch_fo_activities batchINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel fac WITH (SNAPSHOT)ON batch.activity_id = fac.fo_activity_idOPTION (MAXDOP 5)SELECT @inserted_records = @@ROWCOUNTDELETE facFROM @batch_fo_activities batchINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel fac WITH (SNAPSHOT)ON batch.activity_id = fac.fo_activity_idOPTION (MAXDOP 5)SELECT @deleted_records = @@ROWCOUNT-- Raise error and retry if INSERTED and DELETED count not CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_ba_rpt_1072(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRYDECLARE @payout_expired_bizdate INTSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDset @payout_expired_bizdate = @bizdate--Create a temporary table to avoid multiple scans in subqueries; and global temporary table can be reused in other reportsIF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tempdb.sys.tables WHERE name='##tmp_fo_ba_rpt')BEGINSELECT b.div_cal_done_bizdate, a.payout_expire_bizdateINTO ##tmp_fo_ba_rptFROM settled_fo_tickets a JOIN settled_fo_ticket_dividends b ON a.ticket_id=b.ticket_idGROUP BY b.div_cal_done_bizdate, a.payout_expire_bizdateENDSELECT ISNULL(ticket.sports_id, 0)AS SportsID, ISNULL(ticket.ticket_id, 0)    AS ticket_id,--for gen ReferenceTSNISNULL(ticket.is_fixed_odds, 0)AS is_fixed_odds,--for gen ReferenceTSNISNULL(ticket.content_verifier, 0)AS content_verifier,--for gen ReferenceTSN(CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END)AS FrontendID,ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0)AS BusinessDateOfEvent,--''AS ReferenceTSN,CONCAT(ISNULL(ticket.ticket_betline, '')    , ' '    ,CAST(FORMAT(ticket.create_time,'dd-MMM-yy HH:mm:ss')AS VARCHAR(100))    , ' ',REPLICATE('0',4-LEN(ticket.selling_centre_no))+CAST(ticket.selling_centre_no AS VARCHAR),'/', CAST(ticket.selling_window_no AS VARCHAR),' DIV.',CASE WHEN ticket.is_claim=1 THEN ' PAYMENT STOPPED' ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office=1 THEN ' PAY AT HEAD OFFICE' ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN ticket.release_to_centre_no<>0 THEN ' PAY AT BRANCH' ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN ticket.release_to_centre_no<>0 THEN ' '+CAST(ticket.release_to_centre_no AS VARCHAR(10)) ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN ticket.is_reversed=1 THEN ' REVERSED' ELSE '' END,':$',CAST(FORMAT(ISNULL(ticket.div_cal_amt,0)/100.00,'N','en-us') AS VARCHAR(100)), ' AP:$',CAST(FORMAT(ISNULL(ticket.previous_payout_amt,0)/100.00,'N','en-us') AS VARCHAR(100)), ' AP-CNT:', RIGHT('0'+CAST(ticket.generation_no AS VARCHAR),2), ' CP:$',CAST(FORMAT(ISNULL(ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt,0)/100.00,'N','en-us') AS VARCHAR(100)),ISNULL(REPLACE(' '+ticket.remote_system_name,'0',''),'')   )    AS BetDetails,ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amtAS  FOLiabilityOfExpiredStopPayTicketFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.sports_id, ft.content_verifier,ft.is_fixed_odds,ftb.frontend_id, kickoffdate.event_settle_date AS kick_off_date,ftb.ticket_betline,ftd.div_cal_amt,--ft.selling_time,        ft.create_time,ft.generation_no,ft.previous_payout_amt,ftd.refund_amt,fts.selling_centre_no,fts.selling_window_no,ft.ticket_status,ft.is_claim,ft.is_reversed,ft.is_head_office,ft.release_to_centre_no,rs.remote_system_name-- AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amt, -- AVG(ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS refund_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts on ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_id LEFT JOIN fo_activities_pay_vw fap on ft.paid_fo_activity_id = fap.fo_activity_id            LEFT JOIN remote_systems rs on fap.paid_system_id = rs.remote_system_idLEFT JOIN (select --pool_id,t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_winfrom (select  t1.div_cal_done_bizdate,t1.payout_expire_bizdate,eetp.last_payout_date_win,row_number() over(partition by div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_idfrom ##tmp_fo_ba_rpt t1join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date ) t2 where t2.row_id = 1 and CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate  ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @payout_expired_bizdate) t3on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdateWHERE ft.is_claim = 1AND ft.is_head_office = 0AND ft.is_cancel = 0--ANDftc.leg_order = 1AND ft.total_payout_amt = 0 AND ftd.div_cal_amt - ft.previous_payout_amt > 0AND ISNULL(t3.last_payout_date_win,ft.payout_expire_bizdate) = @payout_expired_bizdateAND ft.ticket_status in (2, 7, 8)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketORDER BY ticket.sports_id,ticket.ticket_id,ticket.is_fixed_odds,ticket.content_verifier, (CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END), ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0) OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1508(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_system-- temp name='##tmp_fo_edabi_rpt')BEGINSELECT b.div_cal_done_bizdate, a.payout_expire_bizdateINTO ##tmp_fo_edabi_rptFROM settled_fo_tickets a JOIN settled_fo_ticket_dividends b ON a.ticket_id=b.ticket_idGROUP ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory, COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketUnpaid,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnpaidLiabilityAmount,COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfHOTicketUnpaid,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1  THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END )AS UnpaidHOLiabilityAmount,-- SET 0 below , Because FO no forfeitedSUM( CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and @bizdate = payout_expire_bizdate and ticket.is_head_office = 0 AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and @bizdate = payout_expire_bizdate and ticket.is_head_office = 0 AND AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END )AS TodayPurgedHOAmountFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, kickoffdate.event_settle_date,--tfe.selling_centre_no,--tfe.channel_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,ISNULL(fts.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(edabi_vw.channel_id,5) AS channel_id, -- hard code 5 if case that activities purged1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_head_office,ISNULL(t3.last_payout_date_win, ft.payout_expire_bizdate) as payout_expire_bizdate,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,ft.previous_payout_amt,ft.total_payout_amt,ftd.div_cal_amt,ft.ticket_status,ftd.is_settled-- AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, -- AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, -- AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id                 --INNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pool_status fmps ON fmps.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON fts.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idINNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftb.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idLEFT JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idLEFT JOIN (select --pool_id,t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_winfrom (select  t1.div_cal_done_bizdate,t1.payout_expire_bizdate,eetp.last_payout_date_win,row_number() over(partition by div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_idfrom ##tmp_fo_edabi_rpt t1join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date ) t2 where t2.row_id = 1 and CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate  ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @bizdate) t3 on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdateWHERE ft.ticket_status = 2--AND ftc.leg_order = 1--For all up bet or a ticket including more than one bet, the figure will be grouped to the day by calculating the earliest calendar date corresponds to the “Day” of the match in the betAND ftd.div_cal_amt - ft.previous_payout_amt >0--covers match pool winning and refund tickets --AND fmps.pool_status IN (41, 60)--41PayoutStarted, 60 ConcludedAND fme.event_type_id = 2           --AND fmp.bet_type_id IN DECLARE @rcount1 AS INT =1                 WHILE @rcount1 > 0                 BEGIN                     DECLARE @tmpDeletedRows TABLE(msg_id BIGINT, msg_tpc VARCHAR(200))                     BEGIN TRANSACTION                     BEGIN TRY                         DELETE TOP (5000)                         FROM operational.src_msg_process                         OUTPUT DELETED.msg_id, DELETED.msg_tpc                         INTO @tmpDeletedRows (msg_id, msg_tpc)                         WHERE sys_created_datetime < DATEADD(DAY, -15, cast(getDate() As Date))                         SET @rcount1 = @@ROWCOUNT                         IF @rcount1 > 0                         BEGIN                             DELETE sml                             FROM operational.src_msg_log sml                             INNER JOIN @tmpDeletedRows tmp                                 ON tmp.msg_id = sml.msg_id                                 AND tmp.msg_tpc = sml.msg_tpc                             WHERE 1 = 1                         END                         SET @rcount1 = @@ROWCOUNT                     END TRY                     BEGIN CATCH                         ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;                     END CATCH;                     IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0                         COMMIT TRANSACTION;                       WAITFOR DELAY '00:00:00.1';                 END

READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                                 NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @system_datetime, @is_retry OUTPUT;-- insert ticket_sell_cb_location tableEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert  @location, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert  @account, @system_datetime;--init ticket_bet_allup_plcINSERT INTO @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,unit_bet   ,potential_liability   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,plc_ids)SELECT DISTINCT       system_id  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,unit_bet  ,potential_liability  ,allup_level  ,allup_type  ,STUFF((SELECT ';'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(19),pool_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),line_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),combination_id)FROM    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup tmpWHERE  tmp.system_id = allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, @counter_offer, @account, @location, @tvp_ticket, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 2627 THEN 50016 -- retry required, throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  ENDWHERE  @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@orig_err_num)+': ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update(    @tvp_ticket_status dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT   ,@system_datetime               DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''          ,@count                   INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_id            TINYINT          ,@ticket_id             BIGINT          ,@activity_id           BIGINT          ,@activity_bizdate        DATE          ,@activity_at        DATETIME2          ,@ticket_status        TINYINT          ,@last_ticket_status   TINYINT          ,@sell_activity_id      BIGINT          ,@sell_bizdate            DATE          ,@sell_at            DATETIME2          ,@pay_activity_id       BIGINT          ,@pay_bizdate             DATE          ,@pay_at             DATETIME2          ,@cancel_activity_id    BIGINT          ,@cancel_bizdate          DATE          ,@cancel_at          DATETIME2          ,@is_reverse               BIT          ,@is_pay                   BIT          ,@is_cancel                BIT          ,@is_cancel_reverse        BIT          ,@last_ticket_action   TINYINT          ,@last_activity_id      BIGINT;    SELECT @system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id          ,@activity_bizdate = activity_bizdate          ,@activity_at = activity_at          ,@ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    IF @@rowcount <> 1    BEGIN        SELECT @error_code = 50001              ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';        THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;    END;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history_mem           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND activity_id > @activity_id    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;    IF @@rowcount = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @ticket_status = @last_ticket_status;    END;    -- determine the sell_activity_id    IF @ticket_action = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @count = COUNT(*)        FROM   dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND ticket_action = 2;        IF @count = 0        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = @activity_id                  ,@sell_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                  ,@sell_at = @activity_at                  ,@is_reverse = 0;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 2        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4            BEGIN                SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                            ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 3 OR ticket_action = 4)                ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                -- Payout is the last one                IF @last_ticket_action = 3                BEGIN                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = @last_activity_id                          ,@pay_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                          ,@pay_at = @activity_at                          ,@is_pay = 1;                END;                    ELSE                BEGIN -- UNDO is the last one                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = NULL                          ,@pay_bizdate = NULL                          ,@pay_at = NULL                          ,@is_pay = 0;                END;            END;                ELSE            BEGIN                IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6                BEGIN                    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                                ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 5 OR ticket_action = 6)                    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                    IF @last_ticket_action = 5                    BEGIN                        -- Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = @last_activity_id                              ,@cancel_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                              ,@cancel_at = @activity_at                              ,@is_cancel = 1                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 0;                    END;                        ELSE                    BEGIN                        -- UNDO Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = NULL                              ,@cancel_bizdate = NULL                              ,@cancel_at = NULL                              ,@is_cancel = 0                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 1;                    END;                END;            END;        END;    END;    IF @ticket_action = 1 OR @ticket_action = 2    BEGIN        UPDATE dbo.ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;--unsettled ticket status UPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4        BEGIN            UPDATE dbo.ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6            BEGIN                UPDATE dbo.ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;            END;        END;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_get_ba_rpt_1121](@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRYSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDSELECT ISNULL(ticket.sports_id, 0)AS SportsID, CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' ENDAS FrontendID,ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0)AS BusinessDateOfEvent,ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS CentreNo, SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.all_up_level = 1) THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt  ELSE 0 END) AS FOInvestmentOfSingleTicketSold,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.all_up_level = 1) THEN ticket.refund_amt  ELSE 0 END) AS FORefundOfSingleTicketSold,0AS PMUInvestmentOfTicketSold,0AS PMURefundOfTicketSold,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.all_up_level > 1) THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt  ELSE 0 END) AS FOInvestmentOfAllUpTicketSold,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.all_up_level > 1) THEN ticket.refund_amt  ELSE 0 END) AS FORefundOfAllUpTicketSold,0AS AllUpReinvestmentFROM (SELECT--DISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.sports_id, ftb.frontend_id, --dbo.udf_get_BusinessDateOfEvent(ftc.pool_id) AS kick_off_date,get_kickoffdate_vw.event_settle_date as kick_off_date,ft.all_up_level ,orig_fts.selling_centre_no, ft.parent_ticket_id,ftd.refund_amt,ft.ticket_cost_amt--AVG(ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS refund_amt,--AVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftc.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amt--ftd.refund_amt,--ft.ticket_cost_amtFROM (select h.event_id,h.frontend_id from fo_msg_events h  INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_status event_status on event_status.event_id=h.event_id  INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids j on h.event_id=j.event_id  INNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = j.pool_idwhere   kickoffdate.event_settle_date >= @bizdate   and event_status.event_operation_status >= 4  and h.frontend_id is not nullUNION select h.event_id,b.frontend_id from (select ftd.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id, ftb.pool_idfrom fo_ticket_dividends ftdJOIN fo_ticket_betlines ftb on ftd.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idJOIN fo_tickets ft on ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idwhere (ftd.is_settled = 0 or ftd.settle_bizdate = @bizdate)andft.ticket_status in (2,7)unionselect ft.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id, ftb.pool_idfrom settled_fo_tickets ftJOINsettled_fo_ticket_dividends ftdon ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idJOINsettled_fo_ticket_betlines ftb  with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))onft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idwhere (ftd.is_settled = 0 or ftd.settle_bizdate = @bizdate)andft.ticket_status in (2,7)) b--fo_ticket_betlines_vw b --inner join fo_ticket_dividends_vw d on d.ticket_id = b.ticket_id INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids h on b.pool_id=h.pool_id--inner join fo_msg_events h on h.frontend_id = b.frontend_id --where d.is_settled = 0 or d.settle_bizdate = @bizdategroup by h.event_id,b.frontend_id) events--@tvpnc_fo_1311_frontend_id eventsINNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids legs on events.event_id=legs.event_idINNER JOIN (select ticket_id, frontend_id, pool_idfrom fo_ticket_betlinesunionselect ticket_id, frontend_id, pool_idfrom settled_fo_ticket_betlines  with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))) ftb--dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON legs.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft on ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id=ftb.pool_id --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_asc_activities_pool_vw faapv ON ftc.pool_id = faapv.pool_id AND faapv.[status] = 41 --PayoutStarted--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_vw fav ON fav.fo_activity_id = faapv.fo_activity_id INNER JOIN get_kickoffdate_vw on fmp.pool_id = get_kickoffdate_vw.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw orig_fts ON ft.orig_ticket_id = orig_fts.ticket_idWHERE --ft.is_cancel = 0--AND ft.ticket_status <> 3 --REJECTED--AND (--(ftd.is_concluded = 0 ) --Only non-concluded ticket is included. --OR --(ftd.concluded_bizdate >= @bizdate)----(ftd.is_concluded = 1 AND  fav.activity_bizdate = @bizdate AND fmp.concluded_date = @bizdate) --this pool is payoutStarted and Concluded on Day 3, shown from Day 2 to Day 3 workfile--)--AND ft.selling_bizdate <= @bizdate--AND ISNULL(ft.parent_ticket_id, 0) = 0ft.ticket_status in (2,7)) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.sports_id, CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END, ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0), ticket.selling_centre_noOPTION(MAXDOP 1)--OPTION(LOOP JOIN, FORCE ORDER, MAXDOP 1)--OPTION(LOOP JOIN, FORCE ORDER, USE HINT('ENABLE_PARALLEL_PLAN_PREFERENCE'), MAXDOP 5)--OPTION (QUERYTRACEON 8649)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

ft.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id --from --fo_tickets ft--JOIN--fo_ticket_dividends ftd--on ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id--JOIN--fo_ticket_betlines ftb--on--ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--where ftd--on ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id--JOIN--settled_fo_ticket_betlines ftb  with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))--on--ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--where ftd.div_cal_amt > 0--and
