       ,@record_no         INT          ,@no_of_batch       INT = 10000          ,@return_code       INT = 0          ,@retry_count       INT = 10          ,@retry             INT          ,@row_num        BIGINT = 0;    --common variable    DECLARE            @ticket_batch_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_batch;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_batch_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_batch;    --cancelled ticket    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_cancelled;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_cancelled;    --cashout    DECLARE            @cashout_normal_setted_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_settled_bet;    ----single    DECLARE            @cashout_single_ticket_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_ticket;    DECLARE            @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    ----allup    DECLARE            @cashout_allup_ticket_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_ticket;    --normal ticket    DECLARE            @allup_pool_ids dbo.udt_settlement_pool_ids;    DECLARE            @tournament_allup_pool_event_ids dbo.udt_settlement_tournament_allup_pool_event_ids;    DECLARE            @allup_pool_combination_result_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_allup_pool_combination_result;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_single_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_allup_losing_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_allup_winning_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    --cashout diff    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_pool_ids dbo.udt_settlement_pool_ids;    DECLARE            @cashout_ticket_diff_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_batch;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_pool_combination_result_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_allup_pool_combination_result;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_single_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_diff;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_losing_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_diff;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_winning_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_diff;    SET @retry = @retry_count;    WHILE @retry > 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRY            IF @retry != @retry_count            BEGIN                --clear data to reuse table variables                --common variable                DELETE FROM @ticket_batch_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                 --cancelled ticket                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp;                --cashout                DELETE FROM @cashout_normal_setted_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_single_ticket_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_allup_ticket_tmp;                --DELETE FROM @cashout_allup_bet_financial_tmp;                --normal ticket                DELETE FROM @allup_pool_ids;                DELETE FROM @tournament_allup_pool_event_ids;                DELETE FROM @allup_pool_combination_result_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_single_financial_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_allup_losing_financial_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_allup_winning_financial_tmp;                 --cashout diff                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_pool_ids;                DELETE FROM @cashout_ticket_diff_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_pool_combination_result_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_single_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_losing_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_winning_tmp;            END;            -- if input bizdate is null, retrieve the last EOD business date            IF @bizdate IS NULL            BEGIN                SELECT @bizdate = dbo.udf_get_last_eos_bizdate();            END;                ELSE            BEGIN                IF @bizdate <> dbo.udf_get_last_eos_bizdate()                BEGIN                    SELECT @return_code = 50021                          ,@return_msg = 'Invalid business date';                    THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;                END;            END;            IF NOT EXISTS            (                SELECT 1                FROM   dbo.business_day                WHERE  bizdate = @bizdate            )            BEGIN                SELECT @return_code = 50021                      ,@return_msg = 'Invalid business date';                THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;            END;            IF @system_id IS NULL            BEGIN                SELECT @return_code = 50000                      ,@return_msg = 'SystemId cannot be NULL';                THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;            END;            IF EXISTS            (                SELECT 1                FROM   dbo.business_day                WHERE  bizdate = @bizdate AND settlement_at IS NOT NULL            )            BEGIN                RETURN;--support rerun            END;            -- settle single cancel ticket bets            INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,bet_id)            SELECT a.system_id                  ,a.ticket_id                  ,a.bet_id            FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single a WITH(NOLOCK)                   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_status s WITH(NOLOCK) ON a.system_id = s.system_id AND a.ticket_id = s.ticket_id            WHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND (s.is_cancel = 1 OR s.is_reverse = 1);            --            SELECT @row_num = ISNULL(MIN(row_num)-1,0)            FROM   @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp;            WHILE 1 = 1            BEGIN                BEGIN TRANSACTION;                DELETE @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_batch_tmp                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,bet_id)                SELECT TOP (@no_of_batch) system_id                                         ,ticket_id                                         ,bet_id                FROM                      @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp                WHERE                     row_num > @row_num                ORDER BY row_num;                SELECT @record_no = @@rowcount;                --delete unsettled_ticket_bet_single                DELETE a                FROM dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single a                     INNER JOIN @ticket_bet_batch_tmp b ON a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id AND a.bet_id = b.bet_id;                COMMIT TRANSACTION;                IF @record_no = 0                BEGIN                    BREAK;                END;                SET @row_num+=@no_of_batch;            END;            -- Settle allup cancel ticket bets            INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,bet_id)            SELECT a.system_id                  ,a.ticket_id                  ,a.bet_id            FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup a WITH(NOLOCK)                   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_status s WITH(NOLOCK) ON a.system_id = s.system_id AND a.ticket_id = s.ticket_id            WHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND (s.is_cancel = 1 OR s.is_reverse = 1);             --            SELECT @row_num = ISNULL(MIN(row_num)-1,0)            FROM   @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp;            WHILE 1 = 1            BEGIN                BEGIN TRANSACTION;                DELETE @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_batch_tmp                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,bet_id)                SELECT TOP (@no_of_batch) system_id                                         ,ticket_id                                         ,bet_id                FROM                      @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp                WHERE                     row_num > @row_num                ORDER BY row_num;                SELECT @record_no = @@rowcount;                --delete unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination                DELETE a                FROM dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination a                     INNER JOIN @ticket_bet_batch_tmp b ON a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id AND a.bet_id = b.bet_id;                 --delete unsettled_ticket_bet_allup                DELETE a                FROM dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup a                     INNER JOIN @ticket_bet_batch_tmp b ON a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id AND a.bet_id = b.bet_id;                COMMIT TRANSACTION;                IF @record_no = 0                BEGIN                    BREAK;                END;                SET @row_num+=@no_of_batch;            END;            --retrieve allup info             INSERT INTO @allup_pool_ids                   (pool_id)            SELECT DISTINCT                    pool_id            FROM   unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination WITH(NOLOCK)            WHERE  system_id = @system_id;            --retrieve allup result             INSERT INTO @allup_pool_combination_result_tmp                   (pool_id                   ,line_id                   ,combination_id                   ,result_id                   ,pay_factor_1                   ,pay_factor_2                   ,is_payout_refund)            SELECT r.pool_id                  ,r.line_id                  ,r.combination_id                  ,r.result_id                  ,r.pay_factor_1                  ,r.pay_factor_2                  ,r.is_payout_refund            FROM   dbo.pools p WITH (NOLOCK,FORCESEEK)                   INNER JOIN @allup_pool_ids p1 ON p.pool_id = p1.pool_id                   INNER JOIN dbo.pool_combination_result r WITH (NOLOCK,FORCESEEK) ON p1.pool_id = r.pool_id            WHERE  p.settle_bizdate <= @bizdate AND p.is_deleted = 0;            -- retrieve tournament pool event id for aggregate_daily_tournament_allup_turnover(GPW,GPF)            INSERT INTO @tournament_allup_pool_event_ids                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,bet_id                   ,event_id)            SELECT DISTINCT                    utbac.system_id                  ,utbac.ticket_id                  ,utbac.bet_id                  ,p1.event_id            FROM   unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination utbac WITH(NOLOCK)                   INNER JOIN @allup_pool_ids p ON utbac.pool_id = p.pool_id                   INNER JOIN dbo.pools p1 ON p.pool_id = p1.pool_id AND p1.is_deleted = 0            WHERE  utbac.system_id = @system_id AND p1.event_type = 1; --tournament            -- cashout settled info            INSERT INTO @cashout_normal_setted_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,normal_dividend                   ,normal_profit_loss                   ,normal_investment                   ,normal_refund                   ,num_setted_bet)            SELECT f.system_id                  ,f.ticket_id                  ,SUM(f.dividend) AS    normal_dividend                  ,SUM(f.profit_loss) AS normal_profit_loss                  ,SUM(f.investment) AS  normal_investment                  ,SUM(f.refund) AS      normal_refund                  ,COUNT(1) AS           num_setted_bet            FROM   dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket cashout WITH(NOLOCK)                   INNER JOIN dbo.ticket_bet_financial f WITH(NOLOCK) ON f.system_id = cashout.system_id AND f.ticket_id = cashout.ticket_id            WHERE  cashout.system_id = @system_id AND cashout.cashout_bizdate = @bizdate            GROUP BY f.system_id                    ,f.ticket_id;            -- single cashout ticket            INSERT INTO @cashout_single_ticket_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,unit_bet                   ,total_investment                   ,num_bet                   ,num_normal_bet                   ,num_cashout_bet                    --,race_no                   ,account_no                   ,sports_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,event_type                   ,bet_type                   ,allup_level                   ,account_category                   ,channel_device_type                   ,channel_report_type                   ,cashout_amount                   ,cashout_dividend                   ,cashout_profit_loss                   ,cashout_investment                   ,normal_dividend                   ,normal_profit_loss                   ,normal_investment                   ,normal_refund_investment                   ,already_payout_amount_ap                   ,already_payout_amount_diff                   ,is_allup_ticket                   ,ticket_allup_level                   ,ticket_allup_type                   ,ticket_sell_request_id                    --for FO1309,FO1310                   ,is_inplay_bet                   ,channel_type                   ,centre_no                   ,window_no                   ,ticket_request_at                   ,ticket_eos_start_at                   ,ticket_eos                   ,accept_category                   ,is_inplay_cashout                   ,cashout_datetime                   ,cashout_eos_start_at                   ,cashout_eos                   ,event_id                   ,parent_event_id                   ,pool_id                   ,is_aggregated)            SELECT    cashout.system_id                     ,cashout.ticket_id                     ,t.unit_bet                     ,t.total_investment                     ,t.num_bet                     ,ISNULL(normal_settled.num_setted_bet,0)                     ,t.num_bet-ISNULL(normal_settled.num_setted_bet,0)                      --,t.race_no                     ,single.account_no                     ,t.sports_id                     ,t.sell_bizdate                     ,t.event_type                     ,single.bet_type                     ,t.allup_level                     ,single.account_category                     ,t.channel_device_type                     ,t.channel_report_type                     ,cashout.cashout_amount+ISNULL(cashout.already_payout_amount,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_dividend,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0) --cashout_amount=cashout amount+the same day pool payout that early than ES                      ,cashout.cashout_amount+ISNULL(cashout.already_payout_amount,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_dividend,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0) --cashout_dividend=cashout_amount                     ,cashout.cashout_amount+ISNULL(cashout.already_payout_amount,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_dividend,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0)-(t.total_investment-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_investment,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0))                     ,t.total_investment-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_investment,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0)                     ,normal_settled.normal_dividend                     ,normal_settled.normal_profit_loss                     ,normal_settled.normal_investment                     ,normal_settled.normal_refund                     ,cashout.already_payout_amount                     ,ISNULL(cashout.already_payout_amount,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_dividend,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0)                     ,t.is_allup                     ,t.allup_level                     ,t.allup_type                     ,t.sell_request_id                      --for FO1309,FO1310                     ,single.is_inplay_bet                     ,sr.channel_type                     ,sr.centre_no                     ,sr.window_no                     ,sr.request_at                     ,IIF(c.start_at IS NOT NULL,DATEADD(ss,-c.base_second,c.start_at),NULL) AS                                                       ticket_eos_start_at                     ,ticket_eos.ticket_eos                     ,t.counter_offer_type AS                                                                                                         accept_category                     ,IIF(cashout.is_inplay = 1 OR cashout_event_clock.start_at IS NOT NULL,1,0) AS                                                   is_inplay_cashout -- if the event clock with cashout EOS is not null, means at least the match entered inplay when the moment ES is done                     ,cashout.cashout_datetime AS                                                                                                     cashout_datetime                     ,IIF(cashout_event_clock.start_at IS NOT NULL,DATEADD(ss,-cashout_event_clock.base_second,cashout_event_clock.start_at),NULL) AS cashout_eos_start_at                     ,cashout_eos.event_operation_status AS                                                                                           cashout_eos                     ,single.event_id                     ,single.parent_event_id                     ,single.pool_id                     ,IIF(t.num_bet-ISNULL(normal_settled.num_setted_bet,0) = 1,1,0)            FROM      dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket cashout WITH(NOLOCK)                      INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket t WITH(NOLOCK) ON cashout.system_id = t.system_id AND cashout.ticket_id = t.ticket_id AND t.is_allup = 0 --single ticket                      INNER JOIN dbo.sell_request sr WITH (NOLOCK,FORCESEEK) ON t.system_id = sr.system_id AND t.sell_request_id = sr.sell_request_id AND t.ticket_id = sr.ticket_id                      OUTER APPLY            (                SELECT TOP 1 leg.event_operation_status AS ticket_eos                FROM         dbo.sell_request_leg AS leg WITH (NOLOCK,FORCESEEK)                WHERE        sr.system_id = leg.system_id AND sr.sell_request_id = leg.sell_request_id AND sr.sell_bizdate_year_system = leg.sell_bizdate_year_system            ) ticket_eos                      OUTER APPLY            (                --multiple selection                SELECT TOP 1 single.bet_type                            ,single.account_category                            ,single.account_no                            ,single.is_inplay AS is_inplay_bet                            ,p.pool_id                            ,p.event_id                            ,p.parent_event_id                FROM         dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single single WITH(NOLOCK)                             INNER JOIN dbo.pools p WITH(NOLOCK) ON single.pool_id = p.pool_id                WHERE        single.system_id = t.system_id AND single.ticket_id = t.ticket_id            ) single                      LEFT JOIN dbo.event_clock c WITH(NOLOCK) ON c.event_id = single.event_id AND c.event_operation_status = ticket_eos.ticket_eos AND c.is_started = 1                      OUTER APPLY            (                SELECT TOP 1 cashout_eos.event_operation_status                FROM         dbo.event_level2_eos_change cashout_eos WITH(NOLOCK)                WHERE        cashout_eos.event_id = single.event_id AND cashout_eos.effective_at <= cashout.cashout_datetime                ORDER BY effective_at DESC            ) cashout_eos                      OUTER APPLY            (                SELECT TOP 1 cashout_event_clock.start_at                            ,cashout_event_clock.base_second                FROM         dbo.event_clock cashout_event_clock WITH(NOLOCK)                WHERE        cashout_event_clock.event_id = single.event_id AND cashout_event_clock.event_operation_status = cashout_eos.event_operation_status AND cashout_event_clock.is_started = 1                ORDER BY cashout_event_clock.start_at DESC            ) cashout_event_clock                      LEFT JOIN @cashout_normal_setted_tmp normal_settled ON normal_settled.system_id = cashout.system_id AND normal_settled.ticket_id = cashout.ticket_id            WHERE cashout.system_id = @system_id AND cashout.cashout_bizdate = @bizdate;            -- single cashout ticket - single selection            INSERT INTO @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,bet_id                   ,pay_odds                   ,unit_bet                   ,investment                   ,refund                   ,refund_pool                   ,refund_selection                   ,refund_selective                   ,dividend                   ,profit_loss                   ,bet_value_score                   ,race_no                   ,account_no                   ,sports_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,event_type                   ,bet_type                   ,allup_level                   ,single_bet_pool_id                   ,single_bet_line_id                   ,single_bet_combination_id                   ,pool_event_id                   ,tag_event_id                   ,is_allup                   ,is_inplay                   ,account_category                   ,channel_device_type                   ,channel_report_type                   ,is_on_course                   ,is_allup_ticket   --ticket level                   ,ticket_allup_level--ticket level                   ,ticket_allup_type --ticket level            )            SELECT single.system_id--system_id                  ,single.ticket_id--  ,ticket_id                  ,utbs.bet_id--  ,bet_id                  ,single.cashout_dividend/utbs.unit_bet--  ,pay_odds                  ,utbs.unit_bet--  ,unit_bet                  ,utbs.unit_bet--  ,investment                  ,0--  ,refund                  ,0--  ,refund_pool                  ,0--  ,refund_selection                  ,0--  ,refund_selective                  ,single.cashout_dividend--  ,dividend                  ,single.cashout_dividend-utbs.unit_bet--  ,profit_loss                  ,NULL--  ,bet_value_score                  ,utbs.race_no                  ,utbs.account_no                  ,single.sports_id                  ,single.sell_bizdate                  ,single.event_type                  ,single.bet_type                  ,NULL                  ,utbs.pool_id                  ,utbs.line_id                  ,utbs.combination_id                  ,p.event_id                  ,utbs.event_id --tag event id                  ,0                  ,CASE                       WHEN utbs.sports_id = 1 THEN dbo.udf_is_inplay_for_hr                                                    (utbs.pool_id,utbs.race_no)                       ELSE utbs.is_inplay                   END AS is_inplay                  ,utbs.account_category                  ,single.channel_device_type                  ,single.channel_report_type                  ,utbs.is_on_course                  ,single.is_allup_ticket   --ticket level                   ,single.ticket_allup_level--ticket level                  ,single.ticket_allup_type --ticket level            FROM   @cashout_single_ticket_tmp single                   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single utbs WITH(NOLOCK) ON single.system_id = utbs.system_id AND single.ticket_id = utbs.ticket_id                   INNER JOIN dbo.pools p WITH(NOLOCK) ON p.pool_id = utbs.pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0            WHERE  single.is_aggregated = 1;-- single:only one bet has no settled            SELECT @row_num = ISNULL(MIN(row_num)-1,0)            FROM   @cashout_single_ticket_tmp;            WHILE 1 = 1            BEGIN                BEGIN TRANSACTION;                DELETE @ticket_batch_tmp;                DELETE @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                --cashout_ticket_financial                INSERT INTO dbo.cashout_ticket_financial                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_sell_request_id                       ,is_allup                       ,unit_bet                       ,total_investment                       ,num_bet                       ,num_normal_bet                       ,num_cashout_bet                        --,race_no                       ,account_no                       ,sports_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,event_type                       ,bet_type                       ,allup_level                       ,account_category                       ,channel_device_type                       ,channel_report_type                       ,settle_bizdate                       ,cashout_amount                       ,cashout_dividend                       ,cashout_profit_loss                       ,cashout_investment                       ,normal_dividend                       ,normal_profit_loss                       ,normal_investment                       ,normal_refund_investment                       ,already_payout_amount_ap                       ,already_payout_amount_diff                        --for FO1309,FO1310                       ,is_inplay_bet                       ,channel_type                       ,centre_no                       ,window_no                       ,ticket_request_at                       ,ticket_eos_start_at                       ,ticket_eos                       ,accept_category                       ,is_inplay_cashout                       ,cashout_datetime                       ,cashout_eos_start_at                       ,cashout_eos                       ,event_id                       ,parent_event_id                       ,pool_id                       ,is_aggregated                       ,create_at                       ,update_at)                OUTPUT inserted.system_id                      ,inserted.ticket_id                       INTO @ticket_batch_tmp(system_id                                             ,ticket_id)                SELECT TOP (@no_of_batch) t.system_id                                         ,t.ticket_id                                         ,t.ticket_sell_request_id                                         ,0--t.is_allup                                                         ,t.unit_bet                                         ,t.total_investment                                         ,t.num_bet                                         ,t.num_normal_bet                                         ,t.num_cashout_bet                                          --,t.race_no                                         ,t.account_no                                         ,t.sports_id                                         ,t.sell_bizdate                                         ,t.event_type                                         ,t.bet_type                                         ,t.allup_level                                         ,t.account_category                                         ,t.channel_device_type                                         ,t.channel_report_type                                         ,@bizdate --t.settle_bizdate                                                   ,t.cashout_amount         --cashout_amount                                          ,t.cashout_dividend       --cashout_dividend                                          ,t.cashout_profit_loss  --cashout_profit_loss                                         ,t.cashout_investment--cashout_investment                                         ,t.normal_dividend                                         ,t.normal_profit_loss                                         ,t.normal_investment                                         ,t.normal_refund_investment                                         ,t.already_payout_amount_ap                                         ,t.already_payout_amount_diff                                          --for FO1309,FO1310                                         ,t.is_inplay_bet                                         ,t.channel_type                                         ,t.centre_no                                         ,t.window_no                                         ,t.ticket_request_at                                         ,t.ticket_eos_start_at                                         ,t.ticket_eos                                         ,t.accept_category                                         ,t.is_inplay_cashout                                         ,t.cashout_datetime                                         ,t.cashout_eos_start_at                                         ,t.cashout_eos                                         ,t.event_id                                         ,t.parent_event_id                                         ,t.pool_id                                         ,t.is_aggregated                                         ,@now--t.create_at                                                        ,@now--t.update_at                               FROM                      @cashout_single_ticket_tmp t                WHERE                     t.row_num > @row_num                ORDER BY t.row_num;                SELECT @record_no = @@rowcount;                --delete unsettled cashout ticket                DELETE uct                FROM dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket uct                     INNER JOIN @ticket_batch_tmp a ON a.system_id = uct.system_id AND a.ticket_id = uct.ticket_id;                --single selection(insert to ticket_bet_financial)                --ticket_bet_financial                INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_bet_financial                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,bet_id                       ,pay_odds                       ,unit_bet                       ,investment                       ,refund                       ,refund_pool                       ,refund_selection                       ,refund_selective                       ,dividend                       ,profit_loss                       ,bet_value_score                       ,race_no                       ,account_no                       ,settle_bizdate                       ,is_cashout                       ,sports_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,event_type                       ,bet_type                       ,allup_level                       ,single_bet_pool_id                       ,single_bet_line_id                       ,single_bet_combination_id                       ,pool_event_id                       ,tag_event_id                       ,is_allup                       ,is_inplay                       ,account_category                       ,channel_device_type                       ,channel_report_type                       ,is_on_course                       ,is_allup_ticket                       ,ticket_allup_level                       ,ticket_allup_type                       ,create_at                       ,update_at)                OUTPUT inserted.system_id                      ,inserted.ticket_id                      ,inserted.bet_id                      ,inserted.dividend                       INTO @ticket_bet_batch_tmp(system_id                                                 ,ticket_id                                                 ,bet_id                                                 ,cashout_amount)                SELECT b.system_id                      ,b.ticket_id                      ,bet_id                      ,pay_odds                      ,unit_bet                      ,investment                      ,refund                      ,refund_pool                      ,refund_selection                      ,refund_selective                      ,dividend                      ,profit_loss                      ,bet_value_score                      ,race_no                      ,account_no                      ,@bizdate                      ,1 --is_cashout                      ,sports_id                      ,sell_bizdate                      ,event_type                      ,bet_type                      ,allup_level                      ,single_bet_pool_id                      ,single_bet_line_id                      ,single_bet_combination_id                      ,pool_event_id                      ,tag_event_id                      ,is_allup                      ,is_inplay                      ,account_category                      ,channel_device_type                      ,channel_report_type                      ,is_on_course                      ,is_allup_ticket                      ,ticket_allup_level                      ,ticket_allup_type                      ,@now                      ,@now                FROM   @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp b                       INNER JOIN @ticket_batch_tmp t ON b.system_id = t.system_id AND b.ticket_id = t.ticket_id;                --delete unsettled ticket bet                --insert unsettled_cashout_bet_diff_single                DELETE a                OUTPUT deleted.system_id                      ,deleted.ticket_id                      ,deleted.bet_id                      ,deleted.pool_id WHEN (ticket.flag = 2 AND ticket.selling_centre_no = ticket.cancel_centre_no)  THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketCancelledOfSelfCentre,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 2 AND ticket.selling_centre_no = ticket.cancel_centre_no)  THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END )AS InvestmentOfTicketCancelledOfSelfCentre,COUNT( CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 3)  THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketCancelledForOtherCentre,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 3)  THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END )AS InvestmentOfTicketCancelledForOtherCentre,COUNT( CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 2 AND ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END )AS InvestmentOfTicketCancelledByOtherCentreFROM (--sold on today SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.selling_bizdate, --ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_no--ISNULL(fasc_sell.centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,0 AS bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC','JKC','TNC')--)UNION --cancel on SelfCentre on todaySELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, selling_centre_no,ISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0)  AS cancel_centre_no,--cancel_centre_no--tfe.channel_id AS Channel,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id AS Channel,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory AS SBPoolCategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS SBPoolCategory,2 AS flag,--sold by centre noAVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idINNER JOIN IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC','JKC','TNC')--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 UNION--Other Centre means that ticket which sold at other centre, but cancelled at this centre.SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.selling_bizdate,ISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--cancelled at this 2 --PMU1 AS SBPoolCategory,3 AS flag,--canceled by centre noAVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw fac ON   INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idWHERE ft.is_cancel = 1AND ftc.leg_order = 1--for allup tickets , only leg firstANDfac.create_bizdate = @bizdate--AND ft.update_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status = 5--5CANCELLED--AND ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0)  <> ISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0)--Sold at other centre, but cancelled at this centreAND ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) <> ISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0)AND fme.event_type_id = 1                                               --AND ftc.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC','JKC','TNC')--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 UNION--deduct cancel ticketsSELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.selling_bizdate,--ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_no--ISNULL(fasc_sell.centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0)  AS cancel_centre_no,--cancel_centre_no--tfe.channel_id AS Channel,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id AS Channel,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory AS SBPoolCategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS SBPoolCategory,4 AS flag,--sold by centre noAVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_updater(@sell_request     dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg          dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@now                         DATETIME2)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0;DECLARE    @bizdate                DATE  ,@channel_type        TINYINT  ,@channel_device_type TINYINT  ,@channel_report_type TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT  ,@db_activity_id       BIGINT = 0  ,@db_exists               BIT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id      BIGINT;SELECT @bizdate = bizdate  ,@channel_type = channel_type  ,@channel_device_type = channel_device_type  ,@channel_report_type = channel_report_type  ,@activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_idFROM   @sell_request;IF @@rowcount = 0BEGINRETURN; -- sell_request record not found, skipEND;-- get db activity_idSELECT @db_activity_id = update_activity_id  ,@db_exists = 1FROM   dbo.sell_request WITH (FORCESEEK)WHERE  @system_id = system_id AND @sell_request_id = sell_request_idORDER BY update_activity_id DESC;-- skip update if db record is newerIF @db_activity_id >= @activity_idBEGINRETURN;END;IF @db_exists = 1BEGINUPDATE dbsrSET    dbsr.parent_sell_request_id = sr.parent_sell_request_id,dbsr.ticket_id = sr.ticket_id,dbsr.unit_bet_updated = sr.unit_bet_updated,dbsr.investment_updated = sr.investment_updated,dbsr.tsn = sr.tsn,dbsr.rtsn = sr.rtsn,dbsr.bet_line = sr.bet_line,dbsr.update_at = @now,dbsr.update_activity_id = @activity_idFROM   dbo.sell_request dbsr WITH (FORCESEEK)   INNER JOIN @sell_request sr ON dbsr.system_id = sr.system_id AND dbsr.sell_request_id = sr.sell_request_id;UPDATE dbsrlSET    dbsrl.odds_counter_offered = srl.odds_counter_offered,dbsrl.update_at = @now,dbsrl.update_activity_id = @activity_idFROM   dbo.sell_request_leg dbsrl WITH (FORCESEEK)   INNER JOIN @leg srl ON dbsrl.system_id = srl.system_id AND dbsrl.sell_request_id = srl.sell_request_id AND dbsrl.pool_id = srl.pool_id AND dbsrl.line_id = srl.line_id AND dbsrl.combination_id = srl.combination_id;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.sell_request   (system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,odds_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_level   ,allup_formula   ,allup_type   ,bizdate   ,request_at   ,location_type   ,channel_type   ,channel_device_type   ,channel_report_type   ,centre_no   ,window_no   ,financial_index   ,num_bet   ,unit_bet   ,unit_bet_updated   ,investment   ,investment_updated   ,tsn   ,rtsn   ,bet_line   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,race_no   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_request_id  ,parent_sell_request_id  ,ticket_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,odds_type  ,is_allup  ,allup_level  ,allup_formula  ,allup_type  ,@bizdate  ,request_at  ,location_type  ,channel_type  ,channel_device_type  ,channel_report_type  ,centre_no  ,window_no  ,financial_index  ,num_bet  ,unit_bet  ,unit_bet_updated  ,investment  ,investment_updated  ,tsn  ,rtsn  ,bet_line  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,race_no  ,@now  ,activity_id  ,@now  ,activity_idFROM   @sell_request;INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_leg   (system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,bizdate   ,sports_id   ,leg_order   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,combination_order   ,is_inplay   ,odds   ,odds_counter_offered   ,ems_sequence   ,event_id   ,event_operation_status   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_request_id  ,dbo.udf_get_bizdate()  ,sports_id  ,leg_order  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,combination_id  ,combination_order  ,is_inplay  ,odds  ,odds_counter_offered  ,ems_sequence  ,event_id  ,event_operation_status  ,@now  ,@activity_id  ,@now  ,@activity_idFROM   @leg;END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1534](@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_system-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDSELECT @bizdateAS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.selling_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket_status in (2,5,7) THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END)) -SUM(ticket.cancel_amt) AS NetSalesAmount,--NetSalesAmount = Ticket Investment today ?Cancelled Ticket Investment (Cancel is made today)ROUND(SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.actual_div_cal_amt - ticket.refund_amt) - (isnull(previous_actual_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0)) - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0))) <> 0 AND ticket.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate THEN (ticket.actual_div_cal_amt - ticket.refund_amt) - (isnull(previous_actual_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0)) - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0))) ELSE 0 END) ), 0)AS WinningLiability,--Liability amount of winning tickets (refund tickets are excluded)SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.refund_amt - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0)) <> 0 AND ticket.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate THEN ticket.refund_amt - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0)) ELSE 0 END) )AS RefundLiability --Liability amount of refund tickets (winning tickets are excluded)FROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --tfe.channel_id,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_cancel,ft.selling_bizdate,ft.ticket_status,ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt,  AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amt,AVG(ftd.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS actual_div_cal_amt,AVG(ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS refund_amt,-- previous div cal history for same ticketAVG(previous_ftdbb.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftdbb.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_actual_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftdbb.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_refund_amt,-- previous div cal history for parent ticketAVG(previous_ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftd.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_actual_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_refund_amt,AVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amt,0 AS cancel_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idLEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw previous_ftd on ft.parent_ticket_id = previous_ftd.ticket_idLEFT JOIN ( -- check previous latest dividend historyselect a.ticket_id, a.actual_div_cal_amt, a.div_cal_amt, a.bizdate, a.refund_amt from fo_ticket_dividend_by_bizdate_vw ainner join ( select ftdbb.ticket_id , max(bizdate) as bizdate from fo_ticket_dividend_by_bizdate_vw ftdbbinner join fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd on ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate and ftdbb.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idwhere ftdbb.bizdate < @bizdate group by ftdbb.ticket_id) b on a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id and a.bizdate = b.bizdate) previous_ftdbb on previous_ftdbb.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idWHERE ftc.bet_type_id IN (--special pool bet_type_id32, 33, 34, 35/*SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_typeWHERE bet_type IN ('TSPC', 'MSPC', 'JKC', 'TNC')  --tournament TSPC eventlevel1, match  MSPC eventlevel2*/)AND (ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate or ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdate)AND ft.ticket_status in (2, 5, 7, 8)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 --cancel ticketunion SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --tfe.channel_id,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,1 AS is_cancel,0 AS selling_bizdate,ft.ticket_status AS ticket_status,0 AS div_cal_done_bizdate,0 AS paid_bizdate,0 AS total_payout_amt, 0 AS div_cal_amt,0 AS actual_div_cal_amt,0 AS refund_amt,0 AS previous_div_cal_amt,0 AS previous_actual_div_cal_amt,0 AS previous_refund_amt,0 AS parent_div_cal_amt,0 AS parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0 AS parent_refund_amt,0 AS ticket_cost_amt,AVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftc.ticket_id) AS cancel_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw cancel ON ft.ticket_id = cancel.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idWHERE ftc.bet_type_id IN (--special pool bet_type_id32, 33, 34, 35/*SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_typeWHERE bet_type IN ('TSPC', 'MSPC', 'JKC', 'TNC')  --tournament TSPC eventlevel1, match  MSPC eventlevel2*/)AND cancel.ticket_status = 5 AND cancel.create_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status = 5 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory  OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_log_bet_updater(@activity      dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request  dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@account         dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@ticket              dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@now                      DATETIME2   ,@checkpoint_id               BIGINT = 0)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code                  INT = 0  ,@error_message     NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@i_log_bet_type          TINYINT = 1  ,@is_insert_needed            BIT = 0  ,@is_reverse                  BIT  ,@is_cancel_reverse           BIT;DECLARE    @activity_id                    BIGINT  ,@system_id                     TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id                BIGINT  ,@parent_sell_request_id         BIGINT  ,@log_bet_type                  TINYINT  ,@log_bet_category              TINYINT  ,@last_ticket_action            TINYINT  ,@ticket_id                      BIGINT  ,@counter_offer_id               BIGINT  ,@collation_sequence             BIGINT  ,@account_no                VARCHAR(16)  ,@account_category                  INT  ,@centre_no                         INT  ,@channel_type                  TINYINT  ,@window_no                    SMALLINT  ,@is_on_course                      BIT  ,@result_code                       INT  ,@unit_bet               DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@financial_index               TINYINT  ,@flag                          TINYINT  ,@remark                   VARCHAR(250)  ,@reject_code                  SMALLINT  ,@reject_reason            VARCHAR(250)  ,@activity_code                 TINYINT  ,@activity_type                 TINYINT  ,@message_type                  TINYINT  ,@sell_request_status           TINYINT  ,@ticket_status                 TINYINT  ,@counter_offer_type            TINYINT  ,@collation_type                TINYINT  ,@bet_intercept_reason          TINYINT  ,@bizdate                          DATE  ,@request_at                  DATETIME2  ,@sports_id                     TINYINT;--SELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_id  ,@parent_sell_request_id = parent_sell_request_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id  ,@counter_offer_id = counter_offer_id  ,@centre_no = centre_no  ,@channel_type = channel_type  ,@window_no = window_no  ,@is_on_course = is_on_course  ,@unit_bet = unit_bet_updated--unit_bet  ,@financial_index = financial_index  ,@bizdate = bizdate  ,@request_at = request_at  ,@flag = flag  ,@remark = remark  ,@reject_code = reject_code  ,@reject_reason = reject_reason  ,@sports_id = sports_idFROM   @sell_request;SELECT @activity_code = activity_code  ,@activity_type = activity_type  ,@message_type = message_type  ,@sell_request_status = sell_request_status  ,@ticket_status = ticket_status  ,@counter_offer_type = counter_offer_type  ,@collation_type = collation_type  ,@bet_intercept_reason = bet_intercept_reason  ,@collation_sequence = collation_sequence  ,@result_code = result_codeFROM   @activity;SELECT @account_no = account_no  ,@account_category = account_categoryFROM   @account;--SELECT @centre_no = centre_no--FROM   @location;---- Delete log_bet record for sell undo and ticket cancel undo caseSELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_idFROM   @ticket;--SELECT @is_reverse = is_reverse  ,@is_cancel_reverse = is_cancel_reverseFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_statusWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;IF @is_reverse = 1 -- Sell Undo CaseBEGINDELETE dbo.log_betWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND log_bet_type = 1; -- AcceptEND;IF @is_cancel_reverse = 1 -- Ticket Cancel Undo CaseBEGINDELETE dbo.log_betWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND log_bet_type = 2 AND log_bet_category = 6; -- Reject, CancelEND;---- check all possible bet_type for each sell_requestWHILE @i_log_bet_type < 4 -- 1 Accept, 2 Reject, 3 Counter OfferBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 0;SET @log_bet_category = 0;-- check @activity_statusIF @i_log_bet_type = 1 -- accept   AND @activity_code = 3 --COLLATION_REPLY   AND @ticket_status = 2 --SOLD   AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type <> 3) --REVERSE_CANCELBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;SET @log_bet_category = @counter_offer_type;--SELECT @unit_bet = unit_bet FROM  @ticket;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 2 -- reject   AND @result_code > 0 -- AP indicated reject   AND (@ticket_status <> 5 OR @ticket_status IS NULL) -- null: for request rejected by AP-- AND @checkpoint_id; > 0 -- from RM-- AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type = 0) --NULL,SELL-- AND @sell_request_status IN(5,6,7,9) -- TRADER_REJECTED,TRADER_TIMEOUT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT,SYSTEM_REJECTED-- @sell_request_status in (8) -- ABORTEDBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;-- 2xx Customer / Trader / System / Customer Timeout / Trader Timeout--SELECT @log_bet_category = 1 WHERE  @sell_request_status = 8; -- Customer?SELECT @log_bet_category = 3; -- defaultSELECT @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @sell_request_status = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3--WHERE  @sell_request_status = 9;SELECT @log_bet_category = 4WHERE  @sell_request_status = 7;SELECT @log_bet_category = 5WHERE  @sell_request_status = 6;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 3 -- counter offer   AND @sell_request_status IN(3,4) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT,CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED   AND @counter_offer_type IN(2,3) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER,MANUAL_COUNTER_OFFERBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;-- 3xx Trader / SystemMNL / SystemOdds--SELECT @log_bet_category = 1 WHERE  @counter_offer_type = 3;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 2 WHERE  @bet_intercept_reason = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3 WHERE  @bet_intercept_reason = 7;-- 3xx System / Trader: after FR_4613 simplification on 2020-05-06SELECT @log_bet_category = 1WHERE  @counter_offer_type IN(1,2);SELECT @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @counter_offer_type IN(3);END;--IF @is_insert_needed = 1 -- insert accept / reject / counter offer   AND NOT(@is_reverse = 1 AND @i_log_bet_type = 1) -- Sell Undo already, no need to insert Accept record   AND NOT(@is_cancel_reverse = 1 AND @i_log_bet_type = 2 AND @log_bet_category = 6) -- Cancel Undo already, no need to insert Reject Cancel recordBEGIN-- special handling for ticket cancelIF @i_log_bet_type = 2 AND @log_bet_category = 6 -- Reject, CancelBEGINSELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id   --,@centre_no = centre_no  --,@unit_bet = unit_bet   --,@financial_index = financial_index  ,@bizdate = sell_bizdate  ,@request_at = sell_datetime--,@flag = flag--,@remark = remark--,@reject_code = reject_code--,@reject_reason = reject_reasonFROM   @ticket;END;--SET @log_bet_type = @i_log_bet_type;INSERT INTO dbo.log_bet   (activity_id   ,system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,log_bet_type   ,log_bet_category   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,collation_sequence   ,account_no   ,account_category   ,channel_type   ,window_no   ,is_on_course   ,centre_no   ,unit_bet   ,financial_index   ,flag   ,remark   ,reject_code   ,reject_reason   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,checkpoint_id   ,activity_bizdate   ,activity_at   ,create_at   ,update_at)VALUES   (@activity_id   ,@system_id   ,@sell_request_id   ,@parent_sell_request_id   ,@log_bet_type   ,@log_bet_category   ,@ticket_id   ,@sports_id   ,@counter_offer_id   ,@collation_sequence   ,@account_no   ,@account_category   ,@channel_type   ,@window_no   ,@is_on_course   ,@centre_no   ,@unit_bet   ,@financial_index   ,@flag   ,@remark   ,@reject_code   ,@reject_reason   ,@activity_code   ,@activity_type   ,@message_type   ,@sell_request_status   ,@ticket_status   ,@counter_offer_type   ,@collation_type   ,@bet_intercept_reason   ,@checkpoint_id   ,@bizdate   ,@request_at   ,@now   ,@now);END;SET @i_log_bet_type+=1;END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_ba_rpt_1141(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRYSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622 IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)END--Create a temporary table to avoid multiple scans in subqueries; and global temporary table can be reused in other reportsIF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tempdb.sys.tables WHERE name='##tmp_fo_ba_rpt')BEGINSELECT b.div_cal_done_bizdate, a.payout_expire_bizdateINTO ##tmp_fo_ba_rptFROM settled_fo_tickets a JOIN settled_fo_ticket_dividends b ON a.ticket_id=b.ticket_idGROUP BY b.div_cal_done_bizdate, a.payout_expire_bizdateENDSELECT ISNULL(ticket.sports_id, 0)AS SportsID, ISNULL(ticket.ticket_id, 0)AS ticket_id, --for gen ReferenceTSNISNULL(ticket.is_fixed_odds, 0)AS is_fixed_odds, --for gen ReferenceTSNISNULL(ticket.content_verifier, 0)AS content_verifier, --for gen ReferenceTSNCASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' ENDAS FrontendID,ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0)AS BusinessDateOfEvent,--''AS ReferenceTSN,ISNULL(ticket.ticket_betline, '')+ ' '+CAST(FORMAT(ticket.create_time,'dd-MMM-yy HH:mm:ss')AS VARCHAR(100))+' '+REPLICATE('0',4-LEN(ticket.selling_centre_no))+CAST(ticket.selling_centre_no AS VARCHAR)+'/'+ CAST(ticket.selling_window_no AS VARCHAR)+ ' DIV. PAYMENT STOPPED:'+'$'+CAST(CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(ticket.div_cal_amt,0)/100.00,2) AS NUMERIC(36,2)) AS VARCHAR(100))+ ' AP:'+'$'+CAST(CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(ticket.previous_payout_amt,0)/100.00,2) AS NUMERIC(36,2)) AS VARCHAR(100))+ ' AP-CNT:'+ RIGHT('0'+CAST(ticket.generation_no AS VARCHAR),2)+ ' CP:'+'$'+cast(cast(round(isnull(ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt,0)/100.00,2) AS NUMERIC(36,2)) AS VARCHAR(100))AS BetDetails,ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amtAS PayableAmount,CASE WHEN (ticket.div_cal_amt = 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsLosingTicket --0 winning ticket 1 losing ticketFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.sports_id, ft.content_verifier,ft.is_fixed_odds,ftb.frontend_id, kickoffdate.event_settle_date  AS kick_off_date,ftb.ticket_betline,--ft.selling_time,ft.create_time,ft.generation_no,fts.selling_centre_no,fts.selling_window_no,ftd.div_cal_amt,ftd.is_div_cal_done,ftd.refund_amt,ft.previous_payout_amt --AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amt,  --AVG(ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS refund_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftb.pool_idLEFT JOIN (select --pool_id,t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_winfrom (select  t1.div_cal_done_bizdate,t1.payout_expire_bizdate,eetp.last_payout_date_win,row_number() over(partition by div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_idfrom ##tmp_fo_ba_rpt t1join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date ) t2 where t2.row_id = 1 and CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate  ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @bizdate) t3on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdateWHERE ft.is_cancel = 0AND ft.is_claim = 1--Stop Pay ticketAND ft.ticket_status <> 3 --rejectedAND (ISNULL(t3.last_payout_date_win,ft.payout_expire_bizdate) >= @bizdate OR ft.payout_expire_bizdate = 0) --excludes expired ticket.--ANDftc.leg_order = 1) AS ticketORDER BY ticket.sports_id, ticket.ticket_id,ticket.is_fixed_odds,ticket.content_verifier,(CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END), ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0) OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_get_ba_rpt_1311](@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@update_bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRYBEGIN declare @limit_amt bigintDECLARE @yesterday intSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULLif @update_bizdate is nullset @update_bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)print 'bizdate = ' + cast(@update_bizdate as varchar)select @limit_amt= CONVERT(bigint,(select value from fo_app_config where key_tag='pay_at_ho_limit' and section='general'))set @yesterday = dbo.udf_datetime2bizdate(CONVERT(DATETIME,CAST(@update_bizdate AS CHAR(8)),112) - 1)--DECLARE @tvpnc_fo_1311_frontend_id tvpnc_fo_1311_frontend_id---- select out frontend ID related to this report on today bizdate--insert into @tvpnc_fo_1311_frontend_id --select h.event_id,h.frontend_id from fo_msg_events h--  INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_status event_status on event_status.event_id=h.event_id--  INNER      BIT NOT NULL   ,allup_level                  TINYINT NOT NULL   ,allup_type                   TINYINT NULL   ,bizdate                         DATE NOT NULL   ,total_investment      DECIMAL(28,12)   ,already_payout_amount DECIMAL(28,12)   ,cashout_amount        DECIMAL(28,12)   ,concluded_invest      DECIMAL(28,12)   ,pnl                   DECIMAL(28,12)   ,settle_status                TINYINT);INSERT INTO @cashout   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,is_allup   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,bizdate   ,total_investment   ,already_payout_amount   ,cashout_amount   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,settle_status)SELECT utbc.system_id  ,utbc.ticket_id  ,t.is_allup  ,t.allup_level  ,t.allup_type  ,utbc.cashout_bizdate  ,t.total_investment  ,already_payout_amount  ,utbc.cashout_amount  ,utbc.concluded_invest  ,utbc.pnl  ,utbc.settle_statusFROM   dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket utbc   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket t ON utbc.system_id = t.system_id AND utbc.ticket_id = t.ticket_id AND utbc.cashout_bizdate = @payout_date;UPDATE        uctSET           uct.concluded_invest = uct.total_investment-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_investment,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0),uct.pnl = uct.cashout_amount+ISNULL(uct.already_payout_amount,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_dividend,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0)-(uct.total_investment-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_investment,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0))FROM          @cashout uct  OUTER APPLY(SELECT    SUM(f.dividend) AS   normal_dividend ,SUM(f.investment) AS normal_investment ,SUM(f.refund) AS     normal_refundFROM(SELECT uf.dividend  ,uf.investment  ,uf.refundFROM     dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial ufWHERE   uf.system_id = uct.system_id AND uf.ticket_id = uct.ticket_id AND uf.settle_bizdate > @prev_bizdate AND uf.settle_bizdate < uct.bizdate AND uf.settle_status IN(1,4)UNION ALLSELECT f.dividend  ,f.investment  ,f.refundFROM   dbo.ticket_bet_financial fWHERE  f.system_id = uct.system_id AND f.ticket_id = uct.ticket_id AND f.settle_bizdate <= @prev_bizdate) f) normal_settledWHERE uct.is_allup = 1 AND uct.settle_status = 1 OPTION(FORCE ORDER);UPDATE utbcSET    utbc.concluded_invest = uct.concluded_invest,utbc.pnl = uct.pnlFROM   @cashout uct   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket utbc ON uct.system_id = utbc.system_id AND uct.ticket_id = utbc.ticket_idWHERE  uct.is_allup = 1 AND uct.settle_status = 1 OPTION(FORCE ORDER);DECLARE    @schedule_summary dbo.udt_schedule_summary_daily;INSERT INTO @schedule_summary   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,is_cross_line   ,bet_type   ,payout_type   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,refund)SELECT 2  ,p.event_id  ,utbs.pool_id  ,utbs.line_id  ,IIF(utbs.bet_type = 53,utbs.combination_id,0)  ,CAST(0 AS BIT) AS is_cross_line  ,utbs.bet_type  ,1  ,SUM(utbs.unit_bet)  ,SUM(utbc.cashout_amount-utbs.unit_bet)  ,0FROM   @cashout utbc   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single utbs ON utbc.system_id = utbs.system_id AND utbc.ticket_id = utbs.ticket_id AND utbc.is_allup = 0   INNER JOIN dbo.pools p ON utbs.pool_id = p.pool_idGROUP BY p.event_id,utbs.pool_id,utbs.line_id,IIF(utbs.bet_type = 53,utbs.combination_id,0),utbs.bet_type;INSERT INTO @schedule_summary   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,is_cross_line   ,bet_type   ,payout_type   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,refund)SELECT 2 AS              sports_id  ,event_id  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,0 AS              combination_id  ,CAST(0 AS BIT) AS is_cross_line  ,bet_type  ,2 AS              payout_type  ,SUM(investment)  ,SUM(profit_loss)  ,SUM(refund)FROM     dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financialWHERE   settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND settle_status IN(1,4) AND is_allup = 0 AND event_type = 2 AND sports_id = 2 AND cashout_status < 2 AND bet_type != 53GROUP BY event_id,pool_id,line_id,bet_typeUNION ALLSELECT 2 AS              sports_id  ,f.event_id  ,f.pool_id  ,f.line_id  ,utbs.combination_id  ,CAST(0 AS BIT) AS is_cross_line  ,f.bet_type  ,2 AS              payout_type  ,SUM(f.investment)  ,SUM(f.profit_loss)  ,SUM(f.refund)FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial f   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single utbs ON f.system_id = utbs.system_id AND f.ticket_id = utbs.ticket_id AND f.bet_id = utbs.bet_id AND f.settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND f.settle_status IN(1,4) AND is_allup = 0 AND f.event_type = 2 AND f.sports_id = 2 AND cashout_status < 2 AND f.bet_type = 53GROUP BY f.event_id,f.pool_id,f.line_id,utbs.combination_id,f.bet_type;DELETE aFROM dbo.aggregate_schedule_summary aWHERE  a.settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND a.is_settled = 0 AND a.sports_id = 2 AND a.event_type = 2;INSERT INTO dbo.aggregate_schedule_summary   (is_settled   ,event_id   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,is_cross_line   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,settle_bizdate   ,investment   ,refund   ,profit_loss   ,cashout_investment   ,cashout_profit_loss   ,create_at)SELECT 0  ,d.event_id  ,d.pool_id  ,d.line_id  ,d.combination_id  ,0  ,2  ,2  ,@payout_date  ,d.investment+d.cashout_investment  ,d.refund  ,d.profit_loss+d.cashout_profit_loss  ,d.cashout_investment  ,d.cashout_profit_loss  ,@nowFROM(SELECT event_id  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,combination_id  ,SUM(IIF(payout_type = 1,0,concluded_invest)) AS investment  ,SUM(IIF(payout_type = 1,0,refund)) AS           refund  ,SUM(IIF(payout_type = 1,0,pnl)) AS              profit_loss  ,SUM(IIF(payout_type = 1,concluded_invest,0)) AS cashout_investment  ,SUM(IIF(payout_type = 1,pnl,0)) AS              cashout_profit_lossFROM   @schedule_summaryGROUP BY event_id,pool_id,line_id,combination_id) AS d;DELETE FROM dbo.daily_profit_loss_snapshotWHERE       bizdate = @payout_date;-- Normal match singleINSERT INTO dbo.daily_profit_loss_snapshot   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,payout_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_type   ,allup_level   ,bizdate   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,refund   ,last_result_checkpoint_id   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at)SELECT sports_id  ,0  ,2  ,0  ,bet_type  ,1  ,@payout_date  ,SUM(concluded_invest)  ,SUM(pnl)  ,SUM(refund)  ,-1  ,@checkpoint_id  ,@nowFROM   @schedule_summaryWHERE  payout_type = 2GROUP BY sports_id,bet_type;-- Normal tournament(single/allup) and HR(single only)INSERT INTO dbo.daily_profit_loss_snapshot   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,payout_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_type   ,allup_level   ,bizdate   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,refund   ,last_result_checkpoint_id   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at)SELECT sports_id  ,event_id  ,2  ,is_allup  ,bet_type  ,allup_level  ,@payout_date  ,SUM(investment)  ,SUM(profit_loss)  ,SUM(refund)  ,-1  ,@checkpoint_id  ,@nowFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financialWHERE  settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND settle_status IN(1,4) AND event_type = 1 AND cashout_status < 2GROUP BY sports_id,event_id,is_allup,bet_type,allup_level;-- Match allupINSERT INTO dbo.daily_profit_loss_snapshot   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,payout_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_type   ,allup_level   ,bizdate   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,refund   ,last_result_checkpoint_id   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at)SELECT sports_id  ,0  ,2  ,is_allup  ,bet_type  ,allup_level  ,@payout_date  ,SUM(investment)  ,SUM(profit_loss)  ,SUM(refund)  ,-1  ,@checkpoint_id  ,@nowFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financialWHERE  settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND settle_status IN(1,4) AND is_allup = 1 AND event_type = 2 AND sports_id = 2 AND cashout_status < 2GROUP BY sports_id,is_allup,bet_type,allup_level;DECLARE    @snapshot AS TABLE(is_allup                    BIT NOT NULL   ,allup_type              TINYINT NOT NULL   ,allup_level             TINYINT NOT NULL   ,concluded_invest DECIMAL(28,12)   ,pnl              allup_level  ,SUM(concluded_invest) AS concluded_invest  ,SUM(pnl) AS              pnlFROM     @schedule_summaryWHERE   payout_type = 1GROUP BY bet_typeUNION ALLSELECT 1 AS uct.is_allup = 1 AND uct.settle_status > 0GROUP BY uct.allup_type,uct.allup_level;-- ES Single and AllupINSERT INTO dbo.daily_profit_loss_snapshot   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,payout_type   ,is_allup ,@payout_date  ,b.concluded_invest  ,b.pnl  ,0  ,-1  ,@checkpoint_id  ,@nowFROM   @snapshot b;-- Combination allINSERT INTO dbo.daily_profit_loss_snapshot   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,payout_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_type   ,allup_level   ,bizdate   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,refund   ,last_result_checkpoint_id   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at)SELECT sports_id  ,event_id  ,0  ,is_allup IN(1,2)GROUP BY sports_id,event_id,is_allup,allup_type,allup_level;UPDATE aSET    a.settle_status = 2,a.update_at = @nowFROM   dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket a   INNER JOIN @cashout b ON a.system_id = CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_location(    @location dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   ,@now                DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @bizdate                DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()          ,@error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_location           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,activity_id           ,process_location           ,centre_no           ,window_no           ,is_svt           ,is_on_course           ,esc_no           ,terminal_no           ,ngbt_bet_mode           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT a.system_id          ,a.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,a.activity_id          ,a.process_location          ,a.centre_no          ,a.window_no          ,a.is_svt          ,a.is_on_course          ,a.esc_no          ,a.terminal_no          ,a.ngbt_bet_mode          ,@now          ,a.activity_id          ,@now          ,a.activity_id    FROM   @location a           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_location srl WITH (FORCESEEK) ON srl.system_id = a.system_id AND srl.sell_request_id = a.sell_request_id    WHERE  a.sell_request_id > 0 AND srl.system_id IS NULL;END;
