CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_counter_offer(    @activity                   dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request               dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@data         dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY   ,@now                                   DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''          ,@i                       INT = 1;    DECLARE            @system_id              TINYINT          ,@sell_request_id         BIGINT          ,@parent_sell_request_id  BIGINT          ,@activity_id             BIGINT          ,@activity_code          TINYINT          ,@sell_request_status    TINYINT          ,@bizdate                   DATE;    -- prepare    SELECT @activity_code = activity_code          ,@sell_request_status = sell_request_status    FROM   @activity;    SELECT @system_id = system_id          ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_id          ,@parent_sell_request_id = parent_sell_request_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id          ,@bizdate = bizdate    FROM   @sell_request;    --    -- Update Parent Sell Request Counter Offer Status    IF @parent_sell_request_id > 0 AND NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND sell_request_id = @parent_sell_request_id    )    BEGIN        INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status               (system_id               ,sell_request_id               ,bizdate               ,counter_offer_status               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        VALUES               (@system_id               ,@parent_sell_request_id               ,@bizdate               ,1 -- Accept               ,@activity_id               ,@now               ,@activity_id               ,@now);    END;    --    -- Update Current Sell Request Counter Offer Status    DECLARE            @counter_offer_status TINYINT = 0; -- None, default    -- Accept Case:    SELECT @counter_offer_status = 1 -- Accept    WHERE  @activity_code = 5 --COUNTER_OFFER_CONFIRM           AND @sell_request_status <> 3; --AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT    -- Reject Case:    SELECT @counter_offer_status = 2 -- Reject    WHERE  @activity_code IN(6,7) --CUSTOMER_ABORT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT           AND @sell_request_status IN(8); --ABORTED    --    IF @sell_request_id > 0 AND @counter_offer_status <> 0 AND NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND sell_request_id = @sell_request_id    )    BEGIN        INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status               (system_id               ,sell_request_id               ,bizdate               ,counter_offer_status               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        VALUES               (@system_id               ,@sell_request_id               ,@bizdate               ,@counter_offer_status               ,@activity_id               ,@now               ,@activity_id               ,@now);    END;    --sell_request_counter_offer    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_counter_offer           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,counter_offer_id           ,record_at           ,unit_bet           ,total_investment           ,unit_bet_prev           ,total_investment_prev           ,managed_by           ,create_activity_id           ,create_at           ,update_activity_id           ,update_at)    SELECT @system_id          ,s.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,s.counter_offer_id          ,s.record_at          ,s.unit_bet          ,s.total_investment          ,s.unit_bet_prev          ,s.total_investment_prev          ,s.managed_by          ,@activity_id          ,@now          ,@activity_id          ,@now    FROM   @data s           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_counter_offer t WITH (FORCESEEK) ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.sell_request_id = s.sell_request_id AND t.counter_offer_id = s.counter_offer_id    WHERE  t.system_id IS NULL;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert(@tvp_ticket_location dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT   ,@system_datetime               DATETIME2)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_location   (system_id   ,sell_bizdate   ,ticket_id   ,activity_id   ,ticket_action   ,process_location   ,centre_no   ,window_no   ,is_svt   ,is_on_course   ,esc_no   ,terminal_no   ,ngbt_bet_mode   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_bizdate  ,ticket_id  ,activity_id  ,@ticket_action  ,process_location  ,centre_no  ,window_no  ,is_svt  ,is_on_course  ,esc_no  ,terminal_no  ,ngbt_bet_mode  ,@system_datetime  ,activity_id  ,@system_datetime  ,activity_idFROM   @tvp_ticket_locationWHERE  ticket_id > 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_account(    @account dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @bizdate                DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()          ,@error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_account           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,account_no           ,account_transaction_no           ,account_category_id           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT a.system_id          ,a.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,a.account_no          ,a.account_transaction_no          ,a.account_category          ,@now          ,a.activity_id          ,@now          ,a.activity_id    FROM   @account a           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_account sra WITH(FORCESEEK) ON sra.system_id = a.system_id AND sra.sell_request_id = a.sell_request_id    WHERE  a.account_no IS NOT NULL AND a.account_no <> '' AND sra.system_id IS NULL;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_payout(    @activity       dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@payout        dbo.udt_ticket_payout READONLY   ,@ticket_status dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@divcal         dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@divcal_plc dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg            NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0          ,@is_cancel             BIT = 1          ,@is_reverse            BIT = 0          ,@result_code       INT;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY                SELECT @result_code = result_codeFROM   @activity;        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        --result_code>0, that mean this is a invalid payout        IF @result_code IS NULL OR @result_code = 0        BEGIN            -- set default value, expecially ticket_id, coz it maybe pointing to child ticket_id after partial pay            DECLARE                    @system_id                       TINYINT                  ,@ticket_id                        BIGINT      ,@activity_id BIGINT                  ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT = 3 -- payout                  ,@payout_amount            DECIMAL(28,12)                  ,@activity_code                   TINYINT                  ,@payout_new        dbo.udt_ticket_payout                  ,@ticket_status_new dbo.udt_ticket_status;            SELECT @system_id = system_id                  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id                  ,@payout_amount = payout_amount            FROM   @payout;            SELECT @ticket_id = ticket_id            FROM   dbo.ticket_payout            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND next_ticket_id = @ticket_id;            SELECT @activity_code = activity_code,       @activity_id = activity_id            FROM   @activity;            --            -- ticket action            -- TODO: duoble check/confirm for ticket_action 3,4,7,8            SELECT @ticket_action = 4 -- payout undo                  ,@payout_amount = @payout_amount*-1            FROM   @payout            WHERE  @activity_code = 20; -- REVERSE_PAY_TICKET                    /*            -- currently, there  is no cancel & undo cancel cases            SELECT @ticket_action = 7 -- payout cancel                  ,@payout_amount = @payout_amount*-1            FROM   @payout            WHERE  collation_type = 4; -- PARTIAL_PAY_CANCEL            SELECT @ticket_action = 8 -- payout cancel undo            FROM   @payout            WHERE  collation_type = 5; -- REVERSE_PARTIAL_PAY_CANCEL            */            --            -- set parent @ticket_id, @ticket_action, @payout_amount            INSERT INTO @payout_new                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,activity_id       ,payout_bizdate                   ,ticket_action                   ,collation_type                   ,is_partial                   ,shroff_amount                   ,payout_amount                   ,payout_at                   ,process_location                   ,centre_no                   ,window_no                   ,next_ticket_id                   ,next_tsn                   ,is_headoffice                   ,next_rtsn)            SELECT @system_id                  ,@ticket_id                  ,activity_id      ,payout_bizdate                  ,@ticket_action                  ,collation_type                  ,is_partial                  ,shroff_amount                  ,@payout_amount                  ,payout_at                  ,process_location                  ,centre_no                  ,window_no                  ,next_ticket_id                  ,next_tsn                  ,is_headoffice                  ,next_rtsn            FROM   @payout;            INSERT INTO @ticket_status_new                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,activity_id                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,activity_at                   ,ticket_status)            SELECT system_id                  ,ticket_id                  ,activity_id                  ,activity_bizdate                  ,activity_at                  ,ticket_status            FROM   @ticket_status;            --            -- TODO: check whether need to update below status from ap payout message            -- ticket status            --EXEC dbo.uspnc_ticket_status_update             --     @ticket_status_new,            --     @ticket_action,            --     @system_datetime;            --            -- payout            EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_payout                  @payout_new,                 @system_datetime;    -- DivCal     /*     Logic : AP will not generate DivCal if the Payout of cash bet prior to AP perform DivCal.     Therefore, if there is a payout (is_partial = false) + normal payout (act code = 12) (i.e. not cancel payout/ reverse payout)    and missing divcal done message in     */    --checking whether this record is fit to insert into divcal    IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @payout_new WHERE is_partial = 0) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @activity WHERE activity_code = 12)    BEGIN    --check whether divcal missing the corresponding divcal done record. No worry, dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal will perform upsert    DECLARE @update_activity_id BIGINT = NULL;    SELECT @update_activity_id = update_activity_id    FROM ticket_divcal    WHERE system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id -- this composite key, therefore I should get only 1 record    IF @update_activity_id IS NULL OR @update_activity_id < @activity_id -- divcal record not exists or divcal record is older than payout activity    BEGIN    DECLARE @divcal_new dbo.udt_ticket_divcal;    INSERT INTO @divcal_new       (bizdate       ,system_id       ,ticket_id       ,child_ticket_id       ,divcal_amount       ,selective_refund_amount       ,is_divcal_done       ,activity_id)    SELECT bizdate      ,system_id      ,@ticket_id      ,ticket_id      ,divcal_amount      ,selective_refund_amount      ,is_divcal_done      ,activity_id    FROM   @divcal;    --    -- divcal    EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal      @divcal_new,     @system_datetime;    --    -- divcal plc for selective refund    EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc      @divcal_plc,     @system_datetime;                        END --end of checking whether exists of ticket_divcal record with divcal done = 0 and smaller activity id                 END -- end of checking whether this record is fit to insert into divcal        END        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_dummy_activity_insert(    -- activity    @tvp_activity dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg          NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0          ,@is_retry    BIT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2();    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @tvp_activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;IF(@return_code = 50002)BEGINDECLARE  @system_id         TINYINT,@activity_id        BIGINT;SELECT@system_id = system_id,@activity_id = activity_id FROM @tvp_activity;EXEC dbo.uspx_defer_activity_update  @system_id, @activity_id, 1, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;            END            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE FUNCTION dbo.udf_get_bizdate()RETURNS DATEASBEGINDECLARE    @bizdate               DATE  ,@time_offset            INT  ,@cut_off_time          TIME='06:30:00'  ,@system_date_time DATETIME2 SELECT @time_offset = time_offset  ,@cut_off_time = cut_off_timeFROM   dbo.config;SELECT @system_date_time=dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset();--before 0630, return previouse bizdate--after 06:30, return current bizdateSELECT @bizdate=IIF(CONVERT(TIME, @system_date_time)>=@cut_off_time,CONVERT(DATE, @system_date_time),DATEADD(DAY,-1,CONVERT(DATE, @system_date_time)))RETURN @bizdate;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_scheduler_log_task_get(--Input Parameters@bizdate             DATE -- output   ,@return_msg NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count            INT = 0  ,@return_code           INT = 0  ,@now             DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@now_with_offset DATETIME2 = dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset();-- Get Pool DescriptionBEGIN TRYBEGIN TRANSACTION;IF @bizdate IS NULLBEGINSET @bizdate = dbo.udf_get_bizdate();END;DECLARE    @schedule_task TABLE(task_id    BIGINT);UPDATE aSET    a.task_status = 1,a.no_of_execution = ISNULL(a.no_of_execution,0)+1,a.update_at = @nowOUTPUT inserted.task_id   INTO @schedule_taskFROM   dbo.log_task aWHERE  a.bizdate <= @bizdate AND a.task_status = 0 AND a.task_type = 2-- 1:report, 2:adhocAND (a.schedule_at IS NULL OR a.schedule_at < @now_with_offset);-- tasksSELECT b.task_id  ,b.bizdate  ,b.task_type  ,b.task_status  ,b.schedule_at  ,b.checkpoint_id  ,b.no_of_execution  ,c.task_handlerFROM   @schedule_task a   INNER JOIN dbo.log_task b ON b.task_id = a.task_id   INNER JOIN dbo.log_adhoc_task c ON c.task_id = a.task_idORDER BY b.task_id;-- task default parametersSELECT a.task_id  ,b.parameter_name  ,b.parameter_type  ,b.parameter_valueFROM   @schedule_task a   INNER JOIN dbo.log_adhoc_task_parameter b ON a.task_id = b.task_idORDER BY b.task_id,b.parameter_name;COMMIT TRANSACTION;END TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER();SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;-- Reset NOCOUNT to OFFSET NOCOUNT OFF;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request(@activity                    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request                dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg                     dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY   ,@account                       dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@location                     dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket                        dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@now                                    DATETIME2)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;DECLARE    @return_code INT = 0;IF(dbo.udf_save_sell_request(@activity)=1)BEGIN-- location and accountEXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_location  @location, @now;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_account  @account, @now;-- sell_requestEXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_updater  @sell_request, @leg, @now;-- counter offerEXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_counter_offer  @activity, @sell_request, @counter_offer, @now;-- log_betEXEC dbo.uspx_log_bet_updater  @activity, @sell_request, @account, @tvp_ticket, @now;END;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1525(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)END--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_systemSELECT @bizdateAS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS LiabilityCentreNo,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory,0AS NoOfRefundTicket ,0AS PayoutErrorAmount --COUNT(1)AS NoOfTicket,--SUM(refund_amt)AS PayoutErrorAmountFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id,    kickoffdate_vw.event_settle_date as kick_off_date,          --get the match kickoff date dynamically--ftc.kick_off_date, --the earliest match date ,allup first legISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--tfe.channel_id,edabi_vw.channel_id,p.bet_type_id,ft.paid_bizdate,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,isnull(ftd.early_refund_amt,0) - isnull(previous_ftd.early_refund_amt,0) AS refund_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN fo_ticket_betlines ftb on ftb.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id INNER JOIN fo_msg_pools p on ftb.pool_id = p.pool_idINNER JOIN get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftb.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idLEFT JOIN  dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate_vw ON ftb.pool_id = kickoffdate_vw.pool_idLEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw previous_ftd ON ft.parent_ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id WHERE ft.ticket_status in (7,8)ANDft.paid_bizdate = @bizdateAND(isnull(ftd.early_refund_amt,0) - isnull(previous_ftd.early_refund_amt,0)>0)AND fme.event_type_id = 1                                       ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory   OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_get_ba_rpt_1301(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRYSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDSELECT ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS CentreNo,ISNULL(ticket.sports_id, 0)AS SportsID, case WHEN ticket.all_up_level = 1 THEN ticket.bet_type_id ELSE 0 ENDAS BetType,CASE WHEN ticket.all_up_level = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 ENDAS isAllUp,SUM(ticket.ticket_count)AS NoOfTicketSold,SUM(ticket.ticket_cost_amt)AS PrimaryInvestmentOfTicketSold,0 AS AllUpReinvestmentFROM (SELECT--DISTINCT1 as ticket_count,ft.ticket_id, orig_fts.selling_centre_no, ft.sports_id,ftb.frontend_id, ft.all_up_level,pools.bet_type_id,ft.selling_bizdate,ft.ticket_cost_amt--AVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools pools ON ftb.pool_id = pools.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw orig_fts ON ft.orig_ticket_id = orig_fts.ticket_idWHERE ft.ticket_status in (2, 5, 7)AND ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdateUNIONSELECTDISTINCT -1 as ticket_count,ft.ticket_id, fts.selling_centre_no, ft.sports_id,ftb.frontend_id, ft.all_up_level,pools.bet_type_id,ft.selling_bizdate,-ft.ticket_cost_amt as ticket_cost_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools pools ON ftb.pool_id = pools.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw cancel ON ft.ticket_id = cancel.ticket_idWHERE cancel.ticket_status = 5 AND cancel.create_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status = 5 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.sports_id, CASE WHEN ticket.all_up_level = 1 THEN bet_type_id ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN ticket.all_up_level = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

ftd--on ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id--JOIN--settled_fo_ticket_betlines ftb  with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))--on--ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--where ftd.div_cal_amt > 0--and ,update_time DESC) AS row_id, * FROM  dbo.fo_rpt_ba_1321 WHERE bizdate = @update_bizdate) a  WHERE a.row_id=1  ) today_1321   INNER JOIN   ( SELECT * FROM(SELECT ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY bizdate,sports_id, event_id ORDER BY bizdate ,update_time DESC) AS row_id, * FROM  dbo.fo_rpt_ba_1321 WHERE bizdate = @yesterday) b  WHERE b.row_id=1  ) pre_1321  ON  today_1321.sports_id =  FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY bizdate,sports_id ,event_id ORDER BY bizdate ,update_time DESC) AS row_id, *  FROM  dbo.fo_rpt_ba_1321 WHERE bizdate = @update_bizdate) b   WHERE CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_snapshot_oap_participant_insert(@checkpoint_id                           BIGINT = 0   ,@data          dbo.udt_snapshot_oap_participant READONLY)ASBEGIN-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @now             DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@pool_id            BIGINT  ,@is_exists_other       BIT;SELECT TOP 1 @pool_id = pool_idFROM         pools pWHERE        EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   @data dWHERE  p.event_id = d.event_id) AND p.bet_type = 17;IF @pool_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.pool_selectionWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id AND selection_code IN('120','220'))BEGINSET @is_exists_other = 0;END;ELSEBEGINSET @is_exists_other = 1;END;-- remove existing data-- remove existing dataDELETE sopFROM dbo.snapshot_oap_participant sopWHERE  EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   @data dWHERE  sop.event_id = d.event_id AND sop.event_type = d.event_type AND sop.bizdate = d.bizdate AND sop.stage_type = d.stage_type AND d.event_id IS NOT NULL);-- insert dataINSERT INTO dbo.snapshot_oap_participant   (event_id   ,event_type   ,bizdate   ,stage_type   ,feed_attribute_id   ,feed_attribute_name   ,operation_type   ,name_profile_id   ,is_home_unknown_pk   ,is_home_unknown_fk   ,is_away_unknown_pk   ,is_away_unknown_fk   ,score_pct   ,last_score_pct   ,opening_score_pct   ,player_basket   ,is_pk   ,is_fk   ,is_scratch   ,is_offer_fgs   ,team_type   ,bet_type   ,comment   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at   ,update_at)SELECT event_id  ,event_type  ,bizdate  ,stage_type  ,feed_attribute_id  ,feed_attribute_name  ,operation_type  ,name_profile_id  ,is_home_unknown_pk  ,is_home_unknown_fk  ,is_away_unknown_pk  ,is_away_unknown_fk  ,score_pct  ,last_score_pct  ,opening_score_pct  ,player_basket  ,is_pk  ,is_fk  ,is_scratch  ,is_offer_fgs  ,team_type  ,bet_type  ,comment  ,@checkpoint_id  ,@now  ,@nowFROM   @dataWHERE  @is_exists_other = 1 OR name_profile_id NOT IN(120,220);END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_po_odds_and_param_change(--Checkpoint Parameters@meta                                      dbo.udt_message READONLY--Input Parameters   ,@event_operation_status                            TINYINT   ,@odds_true                   dbo.udt_pool_odds_true_change READONLY   ,@odds_combination            dbo.udt_pool_combination_odds READONLY   ,@odds_comb_race         dbo.udt_pool_combination_odds_race READONLY   ,@param                     dbo.udt_event_trading_parameter READONLY   ,@participant              dbo.udt_snapshot_oap_participant READONLY   ,@event_clock                           dbo.udt_event_clock READONLY   ,@odds_change              dbo.udt_pool_odds_current_change READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                                  NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN-- Set NOCOUNT ON for performanceSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count             INT = 0  ,@return_code            INT = 0  ,@checkpoint          BIGINT = 0  ,@operation_type VARCHAR(50);-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;-- InsertBEGIN TRYEXECUTE uspxnc_verify_operation_type @meta,@operation_type OUTPUT;-- get check pointEXECUTE dbo.uspx_log_event_verify_and_insert @meta,@checkpoint OUTPUT;-- true oddsEXECUTE uspx_pool_odds_true_change @checkpoint,'UPSERT',@odds_true;-- pool combination oddsEXECUTE uspx_pool_combination_odds_change @checkpoint,'UPSERT',@event_operation_status,@odds_combination;-- pool combination odds raceEXECUTE uspx_pool_combination_odds_race @checkpoint,'UPSERT',@odds_comb_race;-- insert param dataEXECUTE usp_po_event_trading_parameter_insert @checkpoint,@param;-- insert participant dataEXECUTE uspx_snapshot_oap_participant_insert @checkpoint,@participant;-- insert event clockEXECUTE usp_po_event_clock_insert @checkpoint,@event_clock;-- insert odds current changeEXECUTE dbo.uspx_pool_odds_current_change @checkpoint,'UPSERT',@odds_change;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;END TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER();SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;-- Reset NOCOUNT to OFFSET NOCOUNT OFF;END;

CREATE FUNCTION dbo.udf_save_sell_request(@activity dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY)RETURNS BITASBEGINDECLARE    @need_save BIT = 0;-- activity status:DECLARE    @activity_code       TINYINT  ,@sell_request_status TINYINT  ,@ticket_status       TINYINT  ,@counter_offer_type  TINYINT  ,@collation_type      TINYINT;SELECT @activity_code = activity_code  ,@sell_request_status = sell_request_status  ,@ticket_status = ticket_status  ,@counter_offer_type = counter_offer_type  ,@collation_type = collation_typeFROM   @activity;-- check statusIF ---- accept(@activity_code = 3 --COLLATION_REPLY AND @ticket_status = 2 --SOLD AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type <> 3)) --REVERSE_CANCELOR ---- reject((@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type = 0) --NULL,SELL AND @sell_request_status IN(5,6,7,9) -- TRADER_REJECTED,TRADER_TIMEOUT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT,SYSTEM_REJECTED-- @sell_request_status in (8) -- ABORTED) OR ---- reject: cancel(@collation_type = 2 --CANCEL AND @ticket_status = 5 --CANCELLED) OR ---- counter offer(@sell_request_status IN(3,4) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT,CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED AND @counter_offer_type IN(2,3) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER,MANUAL_COUNTER_OFFER) OR ---- counter offer confirmed@activity_code = 5 --COUNTER_OFFER_CONFIRMBEGINSET @need_save = 1;END;RETURN @need_save;END;

CREATE FUNCTION dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset()RETURNS DATETIME2ASBEGINDECLARE    @time_offset INT;SELECT @time_offset = time_offsetFROM   dbo.config;RETURN DATEADD(second,ISNULL(@time_offset,0),SYSDATETIME());END;
